local: Sɔnɔ kɛrɛ si kabo minɛm bo bu su adamande woo­wa su n ti barasu. Yiri la sakaraya, ni daŋgba sa­yoo­wam, ni konvikiya ŋgbɛɛn­ŋgbɛɛnm.

eng: Those who are circumcised dont observe the Law themselves, but they want you to be circumcised, so they can boast about your physical body.
local: Bɛrɛ bo ba wura kɛnkɛnnɛ ni, bɛrɛ mmɔɔ ni bu tii su má Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ kpamaa­wa n su. Ama, deke bo i ti na bu koro ka am wura kɛnkɛnnɛ n la ka, bu koro ka bu fa fɔ ɔ, ka, ba ma am asu bu dɛɛ yoo­wa n su.

eng: But as for me, God forbid that I should boast about anything except for the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. The world has been crucified to me through him, and I have been crucified to the world.
local: Ama, mini yiri, m fɔ má yanfɔya fa kɔ deke be su, má ka fa kɔ yiwee n bo ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo wuuri baka jaanu n su ni. Nyini yiwee n bo i wuuri i n dɛɛ ti, mini dɔ, m bu durunya n ka i ti ŋgbɛɛn wɔ, na durunya n gusu bu m ka m ti ŋgbɛɛn wɔ.

eng: idolatry, drug use and casting spells, hate, fighting, obsession, losing your temper, competitive opposition, conflict, selfishness, group rivalry.
local: Na bu su amɔɛ, ni ayiri di ŋgbɛɛn­ŋgbɛɛn, na bu sukpɔ minɛ, na bu sukpini jɔrɛ, na bu susi kɔrɛ, na bu sufa yaa, na bu suyo anyii sam, na bu suse akuruwa kpakpaaki bu ŋuŋu nu.

eng: Being circumcised or not being circumcised doesnt mean anything. What matters is a new creation.
local: Dama nzɛn sɔnɔ su Kristo atin n su na wɔ wura kɛnkɛnnɛ, i ti má pui, wɔ kaaki awura má kɛnkɛnnɛ gusu, i ti má pui. Deke bo i ti jɔrɛ nahɔrɛ su n la ka, i ti ye ni ka minɛ nya wo fɔfɔrɛ bo i fite Nyɛmɛ dɔ ni.

eng: jealousy, drunkenness, partying, and other things like that. I warn you as I have already warned you, that those who do these kinds of things wont inherit Gods kingdom.
local: na bu susi bu beŋgum kɔrɛ, na bu sukun minɛ, na bu sunu nzan bo, na bu suyo ŋgbɛɛn­ŋgbɛɛn kabo nzan nu­fɔm yo barasu ni, na bu suyo sa barasu nbem. Kabo ma du mɔ ase am ni, m toko bɔbɔ am wɔ lɛɛ, ka, sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo bu yo nyini sam ni koro wura má Nyɛmɛ fɛmɛya n nu.

eng: May peace and mercy be on whoever follows this rule and on Gods Israel.
local: Nyɛmɛ ma sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i su ahin atin n bo m kere n su ahoreda, na i si bu aŋunfɔ, dama bɛrɛ ti Nyɛmɛ minɛm bo bu ti Yisareli­fɔm nahɔrɛ su a.

eng: From now on, no one should bother me because I bear the marks of Jesus on my body.
local: Kisa m koro má ka be kpini jɔrɛ be ma m kun, dama m la deke bo i wo m ŋuniɛ su sukere ka m ti Yesu dɛɛ wɔ.

eng: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness.
local: Ama, deke bo Awiɛwiɛ Casi n ma minɛ yo i la ka, bu koro bu beŋgu, na bu la ahorejɔ, na bu ahore­mbaa ti daa­wa, na bu la mindi, na bu buka minɛ, na bu yo sakpa, na bu la dabuŋu.

eng: Brothers and sisters, may the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit. Amen.
local: M ninbaam, ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo buka am kɛrɛ. Ami.

eng: gentleness, and self-control. There is no law against things like this.
local: na bu yo bu ŋu tarakam, na bu la tara­buŋu. Nɔaniɛ kpamaa­wa be wo má bɛrɛ bo i jaraki minɛm bo bu bita nyini woo­wa atin ni.

eng: Those who belong to Christ Jesus have crucified the self with its passions and its desires.
local: Minɛm bo bu ti Yesu Kristo dɛɛm ni, ba yaki bu dawa dɛɛ koroo­wa ni i sa­yoo­wam n kɛrɛ, bu ti ka ba kpama bu baka jaanu n su ye ba wu a.

eng: If we live by the Spirit, lets follow the Spirit.
local: Awiɛwiɛ Casi n ama ya ŋgɔɔ. Nyini ti, am ma ya wo kabo i kere ya ka ya wo ni.

eng: Lets not become arrogant, make each other angry, or be jealous of each other.
local: Má am ma ya wura ya ŋu kpiri, na má am ma ya yo sa bo i yɛ minɛ ahore su, na má ya si kɔrɛ.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will. To the holy and faithful people in Christ Jesus in Ephesus.
local: Mini Pɔɔlu bo Nyɛmɛ dɛɛ koroya­nu na m ti Yesu Kristo jaramasa ni, sukɛrɛ ahin kadasi n ma ambɛrɛ Nyɛmɛ minɛm bo am wo Ɛfɛso miɛ kpiri n nu, na am bita Yesu Kristo atin n nahɔrɛ su, na am ni yiri ayo kun ni.

eng: Grace and peace to you from God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ya si Nyɛmɛ, ni ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo buka am na bu ma am ahoreda.

eng: Bless the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! He has blessed us in Christ with every spiritual blessing that comes from heaven.
local: I ti ye ni ka minɛm kɛrɛ kansi Nyɛmɛ, yiri bo i ti ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo Si, kabo i ma ya ni Kristo ayo kun ni, nyini dɛɛ ti, wɔ fa deke kpa kɛrɛ bo i wo aŋgoro na i fite i Awiɛwiɛ n dɔ ni ayo ya kisi.

eng: God chose us in Christ to be holy and blameless in Gods presence before the creation of the world.
local: Dama saŋga bo Nyɛmɛ nya yi má durunya ni, ye i yiiri ya ka ya yo i minɛm a, na ya ni Kristo yo kun, adena ya yo casi, na má be koro jaraki ya Nyɛmɛ dɔ. Koro n bo i koro ya n dɛɛ ti.

eng: God destined us to be his adopted children through Jesus Christ because of his love. This was according to his goodwill and plan.
local: wɔ du mɔ acici ka i fá ya yo i kunnu nbaam Yesu Kristo dɛɛ ti. Deke bo i koro ka i yo i ni, i koroo­wa lɛɛ.

eng: and to honor his glorious grace that he has given to us freely through the Son whom he loves.
local: I Wa koroo­wa n dɛɛ ti wɔ ma ya ahɔrɔma ace ya nyini aceeri n bo i la má aŋusu n a. Nyini dɛɛ ti, i ti ye ni ka minɛm kɛrɛ kansi i fa kɔ sakpa n bo wɔ yo i ama ya n su.

eng: We have been ransomed through his Sons blood, and we have forgiveness for our failures based on his overflowing grace.
local: Kabo ya ni Yesu Kristo ayo kun ni, i mbunja n bo i fiteeri i ŋuniɛ nu saŋga bo i wuuri n dɛɛ ti, ye Nyɛmɛ ade ya tii aji, afa ya satiɛ kɛrɛ ace ya. Wɔ buka ya agaya, ama ya ahɔrɔma bo i la má aŋusu, wɔ ma ya alecira ni si barasu kɛrɛ.

eng: God revealed his hidden design to us, which is according to his goodwill and the plan that he intended to accomplish through his Son.
local: Nyɛmɛ ayi deke bo i du mɔ koroori ka i yo i, na i wo i ahore­mbaa su na be si má i n akere ya, Yesu Kristo ama wɔ yo yii­wa. I koroo­wa lɛɛ.

eng: This is what God planned for the climax of all times: to bring all things together in Christ, the things in heaven along with the things on earth.
local: Nyini deke n bo Nyɛmɛ koroori ka i yo i n la ka, nzɛn saŋga n ba juuri, i bó deke kɛrɛ kun, bo bu wo aŋgoro, ni bo bu wo asiɛŋgu n kɛrɛ, na i má Yesu Kristo yo i kɛrɛ tii.

eng: We have also received an inheritance in Christ. We were destined by the plan of God, who accomplishes everything according to his design.
local: Deke n kɛrɛ bo Nyɛmɛ adu mɔ acici ka i yo i ni, kabo yiri Nyɛmɛ koro n lɛɛ ye wɔ yo i n a. Ye wɔ yi ya ka ya yo i dɛɛ minɛm, na ya ni Kristo yo kun.

eng: We are called to be an honor to Gods glory because we were the first to hope in Christ.
local: Adena minɛm ŋu ya woo­wa, yɛrɛ bo ya du mɔ afa ahoresi ni Kristo ni, na bu kansi Nyɛmɛ na bu wura i kpiri.

eng: You too heard the word of truth in Christ, which is the good news of your salvation. You were sealed with the promised Holy Spirit because you believed in Christ.
local: I ti sɔ ɔ lɛɛ am gusu dɔ. Am tiiri labari kpa n bo i ti nahɔrɛ na i ma am nya tii­de n jɔrɛ ni, ye am yoori Kristo yarada a, ye Nyɛmɛ afa i Awiɛwiɛ Casi n ase am nyaari, kabo i yo seeri ni, yiri kere ka am ti i dɛɛ minɛm a.

eng: The Holy Spirit is the down payment on our inheritance, which is applied toward our redemption as Gods own people, resulting in the honor of Gods glory.
local: Kabo wɔ du mɔ ama ya Awiɛwiɛ Casi ni, nyini kere ka Nyɛmɛ má ya deke n kɛrɛ bo i seeri ka i fá ma i minɛm n a. Yiri ma ya yo yarada, na ya la ahoresi haari fa kɔ ju cɛɛn n bo ya nyá tii­de nahɔrɛ su a. Nyini dɛɛ ti, minɛm ŋu kabo ya ti barasu na bu kansi Nyɛmɛ jirima woo­wa n bo i la má aŋusu ni, na bu wura i kpiri.

eng: Since I heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all Gods people, this is the reason that.
local: Nyini dɛɛ ti, fite saŋga bo m tiiri ka am ayo Kristo yarada ni, ni kabo am koro Nyɛmɛ minɛm kɛrɛ barasu ni.

eng: I dont stop giving thanks to God for you when I remember you in my prayers.
local: am woo­wa dɛɛ ti, saŋga kɛrɛ m da Nyɛmɛ asi, na m susere i ma am.

eng: I pray that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, will give you a spirit of wisdom and revelation that makes God known to you.
local: M sere ya Si Nyɛmɛ, i jirima woo­wa la má aŋusu. Yiri ti ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo Nyɛmɛ a. M sereeri i ka i ma i Awiɛwiɛ Casi n buka am, na am nya alecira, na i teke am nyi, bo am si Nyɛmɛ nahɔrɛ su.

eng: I pray that the eyes of your heart will have enough light to see what is the hope of Gods call, what is the richness of Gods glorious inheritance among believers.
local: M kaaki sere i ka i teke am nyi na am ŋu i wein ni, adena am si deke n bo i ti na wɔ fere am n na am la ahoresi fa kɔ i busu ni, na am kaaki si deke n bo i ti kpa na i la jirima agaya, bo wɔ se ka i fá ma i minɛm ni.

eng: and what is the overwhelming greatness of Gods power that is working among us believers. This power is conferred by the energy of Gods powerful strength.
local: Na am si kabo i yiko n la má aŋusu barasu ni, na i koro yo juma ma yɛrɛ n bo ya yo i yarada ni. Nyini yiko ni ti bambaka la faŋga a.

eng: Gods power was at work in Christ when God raised him from the dead and sat him at Gods right side in the heavens.
local: yiri ye Nyɛmɛ fa teŋgeeri Kristo i yiwee n nu, afa i atana aŋgoro i saa fɔmbɔrɔ su n a.

eng: far above every ruler and authority and power and angelic power, any power that might be named not only now but in the future.
local: Deke bo i wo lɛɛ, i la yiko tara yiko­fɔm kɛrɛ, amɔɛ o, ayiri o, biɛfɔya o, mɛrɛkɛ o, jina o, ŋumi o, ni ajini o, na i duma n tara duma kɛrɛ bo i wo ahin durunya n bo ya wo nu ni, ni durunya n bo i suba ni.

eng: God put everything under Christs feet and made him head of everything in the church.
local: Nyɛmɛ afa deke n kɛrɛ awura Kristo saa nu ka i niɛ bu su, na wɔ ma yiri Kristo bo i niɛ deke n kɛrɛ su n ayo Kristo jama n kɛrɛ tii a.

eng: which is his body. His body, the church, is the fullness of Christ, who fills everything in every way.
local: Kristo jama n kɛrɛ ti i ŋuniɛ n a, ye i wo bu nu, ye i woo­wa ade deke n kɛrɛ a.

eng: This is why I, Paul, am a prisoner of Christ for you Gentiles.
local: Mini Pɔɔlu, m woori dan­saraka nu, Yesu Kristo ni ambɛrɛ bo am ti má Yuda­fɔm n dɛɛ ti wɔ.

eng: Youve heard, of course, about the responsibility to distribute Gods grace, which God gave to me for you, right?.
local: Nahɔrɛ, m niɛ ka am ati kabo Nyɛmɛ asi m aŋunfɔ ka m yo ahin juma n ma am ni.

eng: God showed me his secret plan in a revelation, as I mentioned briefly before .
local: Nyɛmɛ yo yiiri deke bo i wo i ahore­mbaa su n akere m, bo i koro ka i yo i na be si má i ni. Ma du mɔ akɛrɛ i jɔrɛ kaan akere am.

eng: when you read this, youll understand my insight into the secret plan about Christ.
local: Nzɛn am kaanri kadasi n bo ma kɛrɛ i ni, am ŋu kabo m koro siiri Kristo ŋusu jɔrɛ kɛrɛ bo i wo asiri nu ni.

eng: At one time you were like a dead person because of the things you did wrong and your offenses against God.
local: Saŋga bo am yo keteeri Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ na am yo satiɛ ni, am ti ka am awu wɔ.

eng: You used to live like people of this world. You followed the rule of a destructive spiritual power. This is the spirit of disobedience to Gods will that is now at work in persons whose lives are characterized by disobedience.
local: Nyini saŋga ni, am yo satiɛ kabo kisa durunya n nu­fɔm yo n wɔ. Na am sude Sitana bo i bita asiɛn ni aŋgoro afiɛn n yiko na am de i nɔaniɛ. Yiri bita minɛm kɛrɛ bo ba kete Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ n a.

eng: Earlier generations didnt know this hidden plan that God has now revealed to his holy apostles and prophets through the Spirit.
local: Dawa saŋga ni, Nyɛmɛ ayo ayi má nyini asiri nu jɔrɛ n akere má adamande be. Ama, kisa, Nyɛmɛ ma i Awiɛwiɛ Casi n ayi i akere minɛm bo wɔ yi bu ka bu yo i jaramasam, ni i nɔaniɛ kan­fɔm n a.

eng: At one time you were like those persons. All of you used to do whatever felt good and whatever you thought you wanted so that you were children headed for punishment just like everyone else.
local: Nahɔrɛ, yɛrɛ mmɔɔ yo ti sɔ ɔ lɛɛ, na ya suyo dekem bo ya konviki wo bu nu, na ya suyo deke kɛrɛ bo i ti má kpa na ya ŋu i, na ya koro i ya sunsunni nu ni. Má ya kɛrɛ gusu di nyini wahara n bo Nyɛmɛ afa yaa ka i fa cin minɛm sui, bɛrɛ bo ba kete i nɔaniɛ n wɔ.

eng: This plan is that the Gentiles would be coheirs and parts of the same body, and that they would share with the Jews in the promises of God in Christ Jesus through the gospel.
local: Asiri bo i wo bɛrɛ n la ka, ya de labari kpa n na ya ni Yesu Kristo ayo kun n dɛɛ ti, bo bu ti Yuda­fɔm, ni bo ti má Yuda­fɔm, ya kɛrɛ sáŋga nya deke n bo Nyɛmɛ fá ma i minɛm, na ya sáŋga yo i minɛm, na ya sáŋga nya deke n bo Nyɛmɛ seeri ka i fá ma i minɛm ni.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: Ama, Nyɛmɛ si aŋunfɔ agaya, na i kaaki koro ya agaya.

eng: I became a servant of the gospel because of the grace that God showed me through the exercise of his power.
local: Nyɛmɛ ahɔrɔma n dɛɛ ti, wɔ ce m aceeri ayi m ka m yo i labari kpa n amusui­su­fɔ, ye wɔ ma m yiko ka m fa yo i juma ni.

eng: God gave his grace to me, the least of all Gods people, to preach the good news about the immeasurable riches of Christ to the Gentiles.
local: Nyɛmɛ minɛm n nu, mini ti bu kɛrɛ kaan, ama, haari ni nyini n kɛrɛ ni, Nyɛmɛ ayi m ama m ahin atin n ka m kɔ kan i labari kpa n jɔrɛ kere minɛm bo bu ti má Yuda­fɔm ni, na bu si sakpa bo Kristo ayo i, na be koro si má i kɛrɛ bu ni.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: ya yo ti ka ya wuuri wɔ, fa kɔ i nɔaniɛ n bo ya keteeri n su ni, haari ni nyini mmɔɔ, i koro n dɛɛ ti, wɔ saŋga ama ya ni Kristo ŋgɔɔ. I dɛɛ ahɔrɔma ni ma am nyaari tii­de a.

eng: And God raised us up and seated us in the heavens with Christ Jesus.
local: Ya ni Yesu Kristo ayo kun n dɛɛ ti, Nyɛmɛ ateŋge ya yiwee nu kabo i teŋgeeri Kristo i yiwee n nu ni, na ya ni yiri kɛrɛ saŋga tana Nyɛmɛ fɛmɛya n nu.

eng: God sent me to reveal the secret plan that had been hidden since the beginning of time by God, who created everything.
local: Na wɔ kaaki ama m atin ka m ma sɔnɔ kɛrɛ ŋu sa bo minɛm si má i, na Nyɛmɛ koro ka i yo i na i yo yii­wa. Nyɛmɛ yiiri deke n kɛrɛ a, na wɔ bita nyini asiri nu sam n bo i koro ka i yo i, i ahore su dawa ni.

eng: God did this to show future generations the greatness of his grace by the goodness that God has shown us in Christ Jesus.
local: Deke bo i ti na Nyɛmɛ yoori sɔ n la ka, fa i kisa fa kɔ, i kére i ahɔrɔma n bo i la má aŋusu ni, yiri la kabo i ma Yesu Kristo ayo sakpa abuka ya barasu ni.

eng: You are saved by Gods grace because of your faith. This salvation is Gods gift. Its not something you possessed.
local: Am yarada n bo am ayo i n dɛɛ ti, Nyɛmɛ ahɔrɔma ni ma am nyaari tii­de a, má am sakpa dɛɛ ti a, ama, Nyɛmɛ aceeri a. Nyini ti, má be se ka i fa fɔ.

eng: Gods purpose is now to show the rulers and powers in the heavens the many different varieties of his wisdom through the church.
local: Deke n bo i ti na i yoori sɔ n la ka, nzɛn nfaŋga­fɔm ni yiko­fɔm bo bu wo aŋgoro n ŋu ka minɛm bo bu ti Yuda­fɔm, ni bo bu ti má Yuda­fɔm n abo kun ayo Kristo jama ni, ka kisa bu sí alecira barasu barasu bo Nyɛmɛ la i na i la má aŋusu ni.

eng: This was consistent with the plan he had from the beginning of time that he accomplished through Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Nyɛmɛ yoori nyini kɛrɛ, kabo dawa na i sunsun ka i yo i ni, ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo dɛɛ ti, ye i ma i kɛrɛ yoori yii­wa a.

eng: Instead, we are Gods accomplishment, created in Christ Jesus to do good things. God planned for these good things to be the way that we live our lives.
local: Kabo ya ti kisa ni, Nyɛmɛ yiiri ya sɔ a. Ya ni Kristo ayo kun n dɛɛ ti, ye wɔ ma ya ŋgɔɔ fɔfɔrɛ a, ka ya fa yo sakpa n bo Nyɛmɛ yo fa seeri ya ka ya yo i n a.

eng: In Christ we have bold and confident access to God through faith in him.
local: Kabo ya yo Kristo yarada na ya ni yiri ayo kun ni, nyini ma ya la ahoresi koro ba Nyɛmɛ nyunu na ya soro má sɛrɛ n a.

eng: So remember that once you were Gentiles by physical descent, who were called uncircumcised by Jews who are physically circumcised.
local: Nyini ti, ambɛrɛ bo am ti má Yuda­fɔm ni, am teŋge su kabo am woo­wa yo ti barasu ni. Yuda­fɔm fere am ka tɔkurukum wɔ, na bu fere bu ŋu ka minɛm n bo ba wura kɛnkɛnnɛ, nyini n sɔ ti adamande aŋuniɛ­mbaa su yoo­wa a.

eng: So then, I ask you not to become discouraged by what Im suffering for you, which is your glory.
local: Nyini ti, m sere am wɔ, má am ma am ŋuniɛ yɔrɔki am, fa kɔ wahara n bo m sudi i ambɛrɛ dɛɛ ti ni, i ti deke bo i wura am kpiri wɔ.

eng: At that time you were without Christ. You were aliens rather than citizens of Israel, and strangers to the covenants of Gods promise. In this world you had no hope and no God.
local: Am teŋge su ka saŋga bo am yo si má Kristo ni, am wo dede ni yiri wɔ, na am ti má minɛ n bo Nyɛmɛ ayi bu n be. Sɛsɛ­su n bo Nyɛmɛ yo diiri i di seeri ka i búka i minɛm ni, am wo má nu. Am yo wo durunya n nu wɔ, ama, am yo la má ahoresi be, na am kaaki si má Nyɛmɛ.

eng: This is why I kneel before the Father.
local: Nyini kɛrɛ dɛɛ ti ye mini Pɔɔlu kutu sere ya Si Nyɛmɛ ma am n a.

eng: But now, thanks to Christ Jesus, you who once were so far away have been brought near by the blood of Christ.
local: Ama, kisa, na am ni Yesu Kristo ayo kun ni, ambɛrɛ bo má am yo wo dede ni Nyɛmɛ ni, Kristo mbunja n bo i fiteeri i ŋuniɛ n nu, saŋga bo i wuuri ni, acin am adodo Nyɛmɛ a.

eng: Every ethnic group in heaven or on earth is recognized by him.
local: Yiri ti lamɔsi kɛrɛ bo i wo aŋgoro ni asiɛŋgu n kɛrɛ Si a.

eng: Christ is our peace. He made both Jews and Gentiles into one group. With his body, he broke down the barrier of hatred that divided us.
local: Dama Kristo ti sɔnɔ bo wɔ ma ya sɛsɛ­su ni tana­laifiɛ a. Yiri yo faari i ŋu yoori yoo­wa yiiri kpɔ bo i ti ka kobe na i wo Yuda­fɔm, ni bo bu ti má Yuda­fɔm n afiɛn a, na wɔ yo bu kun.

eng: I ask that he will strengthen you in your inner selves from the riches of his glory through the Spirit.
local: M nyɛmɛsere la ka, i la jirima woo­wa bo i la má aŋusu n dɛɛ ti, i Awiɛwiɛ Casi n ma am nya yiko bambaka am ahore su.

eng: He canceled the detailed rules of the Law so that he could create one new person out of the two groups, making peace.
local: I yiwee n bo i wuuri i n dɛɛ ti, wɔ ma Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ kpamaa­wa n yo má juma kun, i ni i nɔaniɛ maa­wam, ni i atinm kɛrɛ. I yoori sɔ ɔ, adena i fa yɛrɛ Yuda­fɔm, ni bo bu ti má Yuda­fɔm n yo ya daanfiɛ kun. Ya ni yiri ayo kun n dɛɛ ti, ye wɔ sɛsɛ ya su ama ya tana­laifiɛ n a.

eng: I ask that Christ will live in your hearts through faith. As a result of having strong roots in love.
local: na kabo am yo Kristo yarada ni, i wo am ahore su, na m kaaki sere i ka am la koro nahɔrɛ su, na am jina kenken, fa kɔ koro n bo am la i n su.

eng: He reconciled them both as one body to God by the cross, which ended the hostility to God.
local: I yiwee n bo i wuuri baka jaanu n su n dɛɛ ti, wɔ yi kpɔ bo má i wo ya afiɛn ni, ayo ya minɛ kunm akaaki ya aba Nyɛmɛ dɔ.

eng: I ask that youll have the power to grasp loves width and length, height and depth, together with all believers.
local: Adena am ni Nyɛmɛ minɛm kɛrɛ saŋga fiiti ni anyum­boro, na am si kabo Kristo koro am agaya, ni kabo i koro la má aŋusu ni.

eng: When he came, he announced the good news of peace to you who were far away from God and to those who were near.
local: Kristo ba kaanri labari kpa n bo i yo minɛm afiɛn dɔŋgu n maari ambɛrɛ bo am ti má Yuda­fɔm, na am wo dede ni Nyɛmɛ n wɔ, ni Yuda­fɔm bo bu dodo i ni.

eng: I ask that youll know the love of Christ that is beyond knowledge so that you will be filled entirely with the fullness of God.
local: M nyɛmɛsere bekun la ka, i ma am kaaki si kabo Kristo koro am ni, haari ni bo adamande koro si má nyini koro n bo i la má aŋusu ni, na m sere i ka i ma am woo­wa kɛrɛ ti kabo yiri Nyɛmɛ woo­wa ti barasu ni.

eng: We both have access to the Father through Christ by the one Spirit.
local: Kristo dɛɛ ti, ye Awiɛwiɛ Casi n ama ya ni bɛrɛ kɛrɛ atin ka ya koro ba ya Si Nyɛmɛ dɔ a.

eng: Glory to God, who is able to do far beyond all that we could ask or imagine by his power at work within us.
local: Nyɛmɛ yiko n bo i wo ya ahore su suyo juma n dɛɛ ti, i koro yo deke n kɛrɛ ma ya tara kabo má ya sunsun ka ya sere i barasu ni.

eng: glory to him in the church and in Christ Jesus for all generations, forever and always. Amen.
local: Nyɛmɛ ti ye ni ka ya kansi i saŋga kɛrɛ saŋga, yɛrɛ kɛrɛ bo ya ti Kristo jama n na ya ni Kristo ayo deke kun ni. Ami.

eng: So now you are no longer strangers and aliens. Rather, you are fellow citizens with Gods people, and you belong to Gods household.
local: Nyini ti, ambɛrɛ bo am ti má Yuda­fɔm ni, kisa am ti má wɔfɔm kun Nyɛmɛ minɛm dɔ, ama, am anya atin abo Nyɛmɛ dɛɛ minɛm su, ye am ayo i dika­fɔm.

eng: As Gods household, you are built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets with Christ Jesus himself as the cornerstone.
local: Am kaaki ti ka sɔɔ n bo Nyɛmɛ suta i n wɔ, wɔ ta am ataka ataari fa bumboori see­wa n su, yiri la bo Kristo jaramasam, ni Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ kan­fɔm du mɔ fa seeri sɔɔ n bu ni. Nyini fa see­wa n la Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ n bo bu yo kaanri i n wɔ. Ye Yesu Kristo ti ka sɔɔ n jantaraka n a.

eng: The whole building is joined together in him, and it grows up into a temple that is dedicated to the Lord.
local: Sɔɔ n deke n kɛrɛ wo yiri su a, ye i maari i yo woo­biri casi ma Nyɛmɛ a.

eng: Christ is building you into a place where God lives through the Spirit.
local: Am ni yiri kɛrɛ ayo kun n dɛɛ ti, ambɛrɛ mmɔɔ ti Nyɛmɛ Seree­biri Awuru n wɔ lɛɛ, bo i Awiɛwiɛ Casi n wo nu ni.

eng: Therefore, as a prisoner for the Lord, I encourage you to live as people worthy of the call you received from God.
local: Nyini ti, mini Pɔɔlu bo m su Mibiɛ n dɛɛ ti na m wo dan­saraka nu ni, m susere am jande ka, am wo wo bo i kɔ atin su, kabo Nyɛmɛ fereeri am na i kereeri am ka am wo barasu ni.

eng: Conduct yourselves with all humility, gentleness, and patience. Accept each other with love.
local: Am yo am ŋu kaan na am yo bɛnlɛ, na am yo sawɔrɛ, na am la mindi de am beŋgu ni koro, saŋga kɛrɛ.

eng: and make an effort to preserve the unity of the Spirit with the peace that ties you together.
local: Anɔɔsɛ n bo Awiɛwiɛ Casi n afa ama am na am ayo kun n dɛɛ ti, am boro am nyi na am tana laifiɛ na am bita nyini anɔɔsɛ n ni am beŋgu.

eng: You are one body and one spirit, just as God also called you in one hope.
local: Yɛrɛ kɛrɛ bo ya ti Kristo minɛm ni ayo ka aŋuniɛ­mbaa kun wɔ. Na Awiɛwiɛ Casi kun ni wo ya kɛrɛ dɔ a, na ya kɛrɛ kaaki la ahoresi fa kɔ deke kun n bo i ti na wɔ fere ya ni.

eng: There is one Lord, one faith, one baptism.
local: Ya la Mibiɛ kun wɔ, deke kun ye ya yo i yarada. Mibiɛ kun n duma nu ye bu fa biɛ ya kɛrɛ Nyɛmɛ nzue a.

eng: and one God and Father of all, who is over all, through all, and in all.
local: Nyɛmɛ kun wo bɛrɛ a, yiri ti ya kɛrɛ Si a, yiri kaaki ti ya kɛrɛ Mibiɛ a, i ma ya kɛrɛ yo i juma a, na i wo ya kɛrɛ dɔ.

eng: God has given his grace to each one of us measured out by the gift that is given by Christ.
local: Ama, Kristo akpaaki i aceeri n ama ya kun kun n kɛrɛ kabo i koro ni.

eng: Thats why scripture says, When he climbed up to the heights, he captured prisoners, and he gave gifts to people .
local: Nyini ti, ye ba kɛrɛ i Nyɛmɛ Jɔrɛ Kadasi n nu ka, Saŋga bo i fun kɔɔri aŋgoro ni, na wɔ fa domuɛm akɔ, na wɔ ce minɛ aceerim.

eng: What does the phrase he climbed up mean if it doesnt mean that he had first gone down into the lower regions, the earth?.
local: Bo ba kɛrɛ i ka wɔ fun akɔ aŋgoro n la ka, i du mɔ wo aŋgoro dɔ ye i jura baari asiɛŋgu fɛn a, ye wɔ kaaki akɔ aŋgoro dɔ bekun a.

eng: The one who went down is the same one who climbed up above all the heavens so that he might fill everything.
local: Yiri n bo i jura baari asiɛŋgu n la bo wɔ fun akɔ aŋgoro dede n wɔ, ye i woo­wa ade deke n kɛrɛ a.

eng: He gave some apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, and some pastors and teachers.
local: Yiri faari i aceerim ceeri i minɛm n a, yiri la bo wɔ yi nbem ka bu yo i jaramasam, na wɔ yi nbem ka bu yo Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ kan­fɔm, ye wɔ yi nbem ka bu kan Nyɛmɛ labari kpa n jɔrɛ kere minɛm, ye wɔ yi nbem ka bu yo sasa­fɔm, ni kere­fɔm.

eng: His purpose was to equip Gods people for the work of serving and building up the body of Christ.
local: Kristo faari nyini aceeri maari a, na bu sɛsɛ Nyɛmɛ minɛm su, adena bu buka bu beŋgum na bu yo i juma ni, na Kristo jama n nya faŋga buka su.

eng: until we all reach the unity of faith and knowledge of Gods Son. Gods goal is for us to become mature adults—to be fully grown, measured by the standard of the fullness of Christ.
local: Na ya kɛrɛ fa anɔɔsɛ fa kɔ kabo ya yo Nyɛmɛ Wa n yarada ni, na ya si i nahɔrɛ su subuka su, na ya yarada yo bii­wa, na ya kɔ ya nyunu buka su, na ya woo­wa kɛrɛ ti kabo Kristo wo ti barasu ni.

eng: As a result, we arent supposed to be infants any longer who can be tossed and blown around by every wind that comes from teaching with deceitful scheming and the tricks people play to deliberately mislead others.
local: Na má ya yo ka nbaatumam, adena má kɔrɛ­fɔm ba fa bu ŋgɔnlɛ­tiɛ kere ya na bu dadaka ya, na ya mini.

eng: Instead, by speaking the truth with love, lets grow in every way into Christ.
local: Ama, am ma ya koro ya beŋgu, na ya sujɔjɔ nahɔrɛ, na ya kɔ ya nyunu buka su, na ya woo­wa kɛrɛ ti kabo Kristo woo­wa ti barasu ni, dama yiri ti ya tii a.

eng: who is the head. The whole body grows from him, as it is joined and held together by all the supporting ligaments. The body makes itself grow in that it builds itself up with love as each one does its part.
local: Na yɛrɛ bo ya ti i minɛm ni ti ka i ŋuniɛ­mbaa a. Kristo ti bo i bita aŋuniɛ­mbaa bue barasu n kɛrɛ a, na ya kɛrɛ bo kun, na ya kɛrɛ suyo juma n bo wɔ fa ama ya ni, subuka ya beŋgu, na ya koro ya beŋgu, na aŋuniɛ­mbaa n kɛrɛ nya faŋga buka su.

eng: So Im telling you this, and I insist on it in the Lord: you shouldnt live your life like the Gentiles anymore. They base their lives on pointless thinking.
local: Nyini ti, m koro ka m fa yiko n bo Mibiɛ n afa ama m ni, na m bɔbɔ am, ka, má am ma am woo­wa ti kabo minɛm bo bu su má Nyɛmɛ woo­wa n ti barasu ni, dama bu sunsunni kɛrɛ ti ŋgbɛɛn wɔ.

eng: and they are in the dark in their reasoning. They are disconnected from Gods life because of their ignorance and their closed hearts.
local: Bu wo awosin nu n dɛɛ ti, bu la má ŋgɔɔ n bo Nyɛmɛ ma i minɛm ni, dama bu si má be, na bu ahore­mbaa kaaki ti kekereke n dɛɛ ti.

eng: They are people who lack all sense of right and wrong, and who have turned themselves over to doing whatever feels good and to practicing every sort of corruption along with greed.
local: Nyinsɛ ti má bu fa kɔ deke be su kun, saŋga kɛrɛ bu dɛɛ la ka, bu suyo sa ŋgbɛɛn­ŋgbɛɛnm wɔ, na bu suyo daŋgba sam, bu tara má bu ŋu, na bu suyo anyii sam barasu kɛrɛ.

eng: But you didnt learn that sort of thing from Christ.
local: Ama, ambɛrɛ yiri, saŋga bo bu kereeri am fa kɔ Kristo ŋusu jɔrɛ ni, má kabo bu kereeri am lɛɛ.

eng: Since you really listened to him and you were taught how the truth is in Jesus.
local: M niɛ ka am adu mɔ asɔnsɔn i ŋusu jɔrɛ kɛrɛ, am nya ti i susu­fɔm ni, ba kere am ka Yesu ti bo i la nahɔrɛ n a.

eng: change the former way of life that was part of the person you once were, corrupted by deceitful desires.
local: Nyini dɛɛ ti, am yaki am woo­wa dawa n bo i ti má kpa n ji. Am woo­wa dawa n koro ka i daka am na i saaki am a, dama i ma am yo dekem bo bu ti má kpa a, na bu mini am.

eng: Instead, renew the thinking in your mind by the Spirit.
local: Am ma Nyɛmɛ kaaki am sunsunni ni am ahore­mbaa fɔfɔrɛ.

eng: and clothe yourself with the new person created according to Gods image in justice and true holiness.
local: Na am fa wo fɔfɔrɛ n bo Nyɛmɛ afa ama am na i ferema ni yiri Nyɛmɛ dɛɛ woo­wa ni. Nyini woo­wa ni kɔ atin su a, na i kaaki ti casi nahɔrɛ su a.

eng: Therefore, after you have gotten rid of lying, Each of you must tell the truth to your neighbor because we are parts of each other in the same body.
local: Nyini ti, má am bu kɔrɛ, am kan nahɔrɛ ma am beŋgu, dama ya kɛrɛ ti aŋuniɛ­mbaa kun n bue barasu be wɔ.

eng: Be angry without sinning. Dont let the sun set on your anger.
local: Nzɛn am be fa yaa, má i yo satiɛ, má i fa yaa haari wiɛ kɔ tɔ.

eng: Dont provide an opportunity for the devil.
local: Má am ma Sitana atin haari kaan sɔ, na i ma am yo satiɛ.

eng: Thieves should no longer steal. Instead, they should go to work, using their hands to do good so that they will have something to share with whoever is in need.
local: Sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i yo wɔ, i ti ye ni ka i mi yaki awie, na i yo i tiɛŋgu juma ni anyum­boro su, na i nya i koroo­wa, adena i koro buka yaari­fɔm.

eng: Dont let any foul words come out of your mouth. Only say what is helpful when it is needed for building up the community so that it benefits those who hear what you say.
local: Má am ma jɔrɛ tiɛ fite am nɔɔ nu, ama, am ma am nɔɔ fite kpa, na i buka minɛm, na bu kɔ bu nyunu buka su, na sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i tiiri i, i mi koro su Nyɛmɛ atin n su nyunyumi.

eng: Dont make the Holy Spirit of God unhappy—you were sealed by him for the day of redemption.
local: Má am saaki Nyɛmɛ Awiɛwiɛ Casi n ahore, dama yiri ye Nyɛmɛ afa i ase am nyaari a, ka i bá de am tii ji cɛɛn be a.

eng: Put aside all bitterness, losing your temper, anger, shouting, and slander, along with every other evil.
local: Má am ma am kunnu yo wiwi, má am ma yaa ti am, má am kan am beŋgu ndiɛ, má am se akuruwa, má am kpiɛ am beŋgu nzukɔ, má am kpɔ am beŋgu deke be ti.

eng: Be kind, compassionate, and forgiving to each other, in the same way God forgave you in Christ.
local: Ama, am yo am beŋgu kpa, na am si am beŋgu aŋunfɔ, na am fa am beŋgum ŋgasi ce bu kabo Nyɛmɛ afa ace am Kristo dɛɛ ti ni.

eng: Therefore, imitate God like dearly loved children.
local: Nyini ti, kabo am nya ti Nyɛmɛ nbaa koroo­wam ni, am boro am nyi, na am ma am woo­wa ti kabo i woo­wa ti barasu ni.

eng: Live your life with love, following the example of Christ, who loved us and gave himself for us. He was a sacrificial offering that smelled sweet to God.
local: I ti ye ni ka am ma koro wo am dɔ, kabo Kristo koro ya barasu na i faari i ŋu yoori yoo­wa maari ya na i suunri Nyɛmɛ nu ni.

eng: Sexual immorality, and any kind of impurity or greed, shouldnt even be mentioned among you, which is right for holy persons.
local: Kabo am ti Nyɛmɛ minɛm ni, má am yo sakaraya, má am yo daŋgba sam, má am se ka am nyunu boro neŋge kpini su, má am bo nyini sereyam n be mmɔɔ anzama am nu.

eng: Obscene language, silly talk, or vulgar jokes arent acceptable for believers. Instead, there should be thanksgiving.
local: Na má am ma jɔrɛ ŋgbɛɛn­ŋgbɛɛn fite am nɔɔ nu, má am jɔjɔ jɔrɛ bo ŋgɔnlɛ wo má nu, má am yo kɔkɔrɔ tiɛ. Ama, i ti ye ni ka am da Nyɛmɛ asi saŋga kɛrɛ.

eng: Because you know for sure that persons who are sexually immoral, impure, or greedy—which happens when things become gods—those persons wont inherit the kingdom of Christ and God.
local: Am si tenle su ka sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i yo sakaraya, ni daŋgba sam, ni bo i nyunu boro neŋge kpini su, sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i yo sɔ, i mi su má Nyɛmɛ, i su neŋgem wɔ. Kristo ni Nyɛmɛ bá niɛ má i su, na i nya má deke n bo Nyɛmɛ ase ka i fá ma i minɛm ni.

eng: Nobody should deceive you with stupid ideas. Gods anger comes down on those who are disobedient because of this kind of thing.
local: Má am ma be fa i jɔrɛ ŋgbɛɛn be dadaka am, dama nyinim sɔ dɛɛ ti, ye Nyɛmɛ fá yaa cin minɛm bo ba kete ka bu de má i nɔaniɛ n sui n a.

eng: So you shouldnt have anything to do with them.
local: Nyini ti, má am ni nyini minɛm sɔ saŋga wo.

eng: You were once darkness, but now you are light in the Lord, so live your life as children of light.
local: Saŋga be, ambɛrɛ mmɔɔ ni am tii yo woori awosin nu yo satiɛ wɔ, ama, kisa, na am akaaki ya Mibiɛ Yesu minɛm ni, am ti wein nu­fɔm wɔ lɛɛ. Nyini ti, am ma am woo­wa kere ka am ti wein nu­fɔm wɔ.

eng: Light produces fruit that consists of every sort of goodness, justice, and truth.
local: Má pui ti ye m se sɔ a, dama minɛm bo bu wo wein nu ni, bɛrɛ la wo kpa a, ye bu yo sa bo i ti kpa kɛrɛ a, na bu yo sa bo i kɔ atin su Nyɛmɛ dɔ, na bu bita nahɔrɛ.

eng: Therefore, test everything to see whats pleasing to the Lord.
local: Nyini ti, am boro am nyi, na am si deke bo i sun Nyɛmɛ nu.

eng: and dont participate in the unfruitful actions of darkness. Instead, you should reveal the truth about them.
local: Má am fa am ŋu bo minɛm bo bu wo awosin nu n su, na am yo sa ŋgbɛɛn­ŋgbɛɛn n bo bu yo i ni, ama, am yi bu nyini sa­yoo­wam fite fofoe nu.

eng: Its embarrassing to even talk about what certain persons do in secret.
local: I ti nyinsɛ wɔ mmɔɔ, ka ya bo su fa kɔ bu nyini sam bo bu yo bu asiri nu ni.

eng: But everything exposed to the light is revealed by the light.
local: Ama, deke kɛrɛ bo i wo fiɛɛ­wa nu, na i nya fiteeri fofoe nu, nyini saŋga, kabo i ti kɛrɛ, i nyunu da casi wɔ lɛɛ, dama i wo wein nu wɔ.

eng: Everything that is revealed by the light is light. Therefore, it says, Wake up, sleeper! Get up from the dead, and Christ will shine on you. .
local: Dama deke kɛrɛ bo i nya fiteeri fofoe nu ti wein wɔ. Nyini ti ye ba se ka, Wɔrɔ daafiri­fɔ ni, yasu na a teŋge u yiwee nu, na Kristo dɛɛ wein n ta gɔ u ŋu.

eng: So be careful to live your life wisely, not foolishly.
local: Nyini ti, am si am ŋu sa na am si wo, má am wo kabo bo bu si má be n wo barasu ni, ama, am wo kabo minɛm bo bu la ŋgɔnlɛ n wo barasu ni.

eng: Take advantage of every opportunity because these are evil times.
local: Saŋga kɛrɛ am boro am nyi na am suyo Nyɛmɛ juma, na má am tana ŋgbɛɛn, dama ahin saŋga n bo ya wo nu ni, satiɛ­yo asunnu agaya.

eng: Because of this, dont be ignorant, but understand the Lords will.
local: Nyini ti, má am yo ka sinnzinm, ama, am boro am nyi, na am si deke bo Mibiɛ n koro ka am yo i.

eng: Dont get drunk on wine, which produces depravity. Instead, be filled with the Spirit in the following ways.
local: Má am nu nzan bo, dama nzan saaki sɔnɔ tii wɔ, ama, am ma Awiɛwiɛ Casi n wo am dɔ saŋga kɛrɛ.

eng: speak to each other with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs; sing and make music to the Lord in your hearts.
local: Am fa Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛm bo bu wo kansi jue kɛrɛɛ­wam n nu n fa di jue ma am beŋgu, na am di jue n bo Awiɛwiɛ Casi n kere am, na am di jue kansi Nyɛmɛ am ahore su.

eng: always give thanks to God the Father for everything in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Am da ya Si Nyɛmɛ asi saŋga kɛrɛ, fa kɔ deke kɛrɛ su, ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo dɛɛ ti.

eng: and submit to each other out of respect for Christ.
local: Am soro Kristo n dɛɛ ti, am de am beŋgu nɔaniɛ.

eng: For example, wives should submit to their husbands as if to the Lord.
local: Nbaram, am de am hunm nɔaniɛ kabo am de Mibiɛ n nɔaniɛ barasu ni.

eng: A husband is the head of his wife like Christ is head of the church, that is, the savior of the body.
local: Dama biɛsɔ la yiko niɛ i yi su, kabo Kristo la yiko niɛ i jama n su barasu ni. Kristo jama n ti i ŋuniɛ­mbaa a, yiri ni i tii, ti bu Tii­de­fɔ a.

eng: So wives submit to their husbands in everything like the church submits to Christ.
local: Kabo Kristo jama de i nɔaniɛ barasu ni, sɔ ye i ti ye ni ka nbaram de bu hunm nɔaniɛ deke kɛrɛ nu n a.

eng: As for husbands, love your wives just like Christ loved the church and gave himself for her.
local: Nbiɛsɔm, am koro am yim kabo Kristo koro i jama n na i tɔɔri i ŋgɔɔ wu maari bu barasu ni.

eng: He did this to make her holy by washing her in a bath of water with the word.
local: adena i yo bu casi wɔ. Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ n bo bu tiiri i ni, ye bu biɛɛri bu Nyɛmɛ nzue yiiri satiɛ kɛrɛ bo i wo bu ahore su a.

eng: He did this to present himself with a splendid church, one without any sort of stain or wrinkle on her clothes, but rather one that is holy and blameless.
local: adena i fa bu bo i ŋu su na bu wo i dɔ, na bu yo nyumi agaya, na bu yo casi na bu la má fin be wara bu la má ŋgasi be, na be koro jaraki má bu.

eng: Thats how husbands ought to love their wives—in the same way as they do their own bodies. Anyone who loves his wife loves himself.
local: Sɔ ye i ti ye ni ka nbiɛsɔm koro bu yim kabo bu koro bu ŋu barasu n a. Dama biɛsɔ kɛrɛ bo i koro i yi koro i ŋu wɔ lɛɛ.

eng: No one ever hates his own body, but feeds it and takes care of it just like Christ does for the church.
local: Sɔnɔ be wo má bɛrɛ bo i koro má i ŋu, ama, sɔnɔ kɛrɛ niɛ i ŋu su wɔ nyunyumi, kabo Kristo niɛ i jama su barasu ni.

eng: because we are parts of his body.
local: dama ya kɛrɛ ti Kristo ŋuniɛ­mbaa n wɔ lɛɛ.

eng: This is why a man will leave his father and mother and be united with his wife, and the two of them will be one body .
local: Ba kɛrɛ i Nyɛmɛ Jɔrɛ Kadasi n nu ka, Nyini dɛɛ ti, biɛsɔ yaki i si, ni i ni, na i fa i ŋu mata i yi, nyini saŋga bu minɛ nnyɔ n ayo deke kun lɛɛ.

eng: Marriage is a significant allegory, and Im applying it to Christ and the church.
local: Asiri nu jɔrɛ bambaka be wo ahin nɔaniɛ n nu, na ma ŋu i la ka, i sukan fa kɔ Kristo ni i jama n jɔrɛ wɔ.

eng: In any case, as for you individually, each one of you should love his wife as himself, and wives should respect their husbands.
local: Ama, jɔrɛ n bo m koro ka m se am n la ka, i ti ye ni ka biɛsɔ kɛrɛ koro i yi, kabo i koro i ŋu ni, na bara kɛrɛ bu i hun.

eng: As for children, obey your parents in the Lord, because it is right.
local: Nbaatumam, am de am wu­fɔm nɔaniɛ, Mibiɛ n dɛɛ ti, dama nyini ti kpa a.

eng: The commandment Honor your father and mother is the first one with a promise attached.
local: Ka, Bu u si ni u ni. Ahin n ti Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ maa­wa ciciri su bo Nyɛmɛ bukaari su seeri ka nzɛn a yoori sɔ, i ma u deke kpa.

eng: so that things will go well for you, and you will live for a long time in the land .
local: ka, Nyini ma a ŋu u ŋu fiɛ a, na u ŋgɔɔ kɔ tintiin durunya n nu fɛn a.

eng: As for parents, dont provoke your children to anger, but raise them with discipline and instruction about the Lord.
local: Nbaa­sim, má am yo sa bo i yɛ am nbaam yaa su. Ama, am ta bu ataari bo i ti kpa, na am tu bu fɔ fa kɔ Mibiɛ n dɛɛ atin n su.

eng: As for slaves, obey your human masters with fear and trembling and with sincere devotion to Christ.
local: Ambɛrɛ bo am ti akɔɔm ni, am de am mibiɛm bo bu wo durunya n nu fɛn n nɔaniɛ, na am soro bu ahore, na am yo deke kɛrɛ bo bu ŋa am yo i ni am ahore­mbaa kun, kabo am yo ma Kristo barasu ni.

eng: Dont work to make yourself look good and try to flatter people, but act like slaves of Christ carrying out Gods will from the heart.
local: Má am yo ka bu niɛ am dɛɛ ti, na am koro ka am yo na bu kunnu jɔ am ŋu, ama, am yo bo i sun Nyɛmɛ nu, ni am ahore­mbaa kun, ka am ti Kristo dɛɛ akɔɔm ti.

eng: Serve your owners enthusiastically, as though you were serving the Lord and not human beings.
local: Am yo am juma kɛrɛ ma am mibiɛm ni ahorejɔ, ka am suyo ma ya Mibiɛ Yesu wɔ, ama, má ka am suyo ma adamande wɔ.

eng: You know that the Lord will reward every person who does what is right, whether that person is a slave or a free person.
local: Nahɔrɛ, ye m ŋa am si ka, sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i yoori i juma nahɔrɛ su, Mibiɛ ni tɔ́ i mi ŋkatɔ, nzɛn i ti akɔɔ o, wara i ti má akɔɔ o.

eng: As for masters, treat your slaves in the same way. Stop threatening them, because you know that both you and your slaves have a master in heaven. He doesnt distinguish between people on the basis of status.
local: Ambɛrɛ gusu bo am ti bu mibiɛm ni, am bita bu nyunyumi, má am suwura bu sɛrɛ. Má am ma am wara fi ka am ni bɛrɛ kɛrɛ Mibiɛ n bo i wo aŋgoro n ti kun wɔ. I tambu má nu.

eng: Finally, be strengthened by the Lord and his powerful strength.
local: Jɔrɛ n bo wɔ ka n la ka, am ma Mibiɛ n ma am faŋga fa kɔ i yiko bambaka n bo i la i n su.

eng: Put on Gods armor so that you can make a stand against the tricks of the devil.
local: Am fa biɛsɔya neŋge n kɛrɛ bo Nyɛmɛ afa ama am n sana, adena am ba koro jina kenken na am kunma Sitana ŋgɔnlɛ­tiɛ kɛrɛ bo i fa dadaka am ni.

eng: We arent fighting against human enemies but against rulers, authorities, forces of cosmic darkness, and spiritual powers of evil in the heavens.
local: Dama má ya ni adamande kun luɛ n a, ama, ya kun luɛ n ni Sitana ni yiko­fɔm barasu barasum kɛrɛ bo bu wo aŋgoro ni, ni bo bu la yiko bita minɛm bo bu wo awosin nu durunya n nu fɛn n wɔ.

eng: Therefore, pick up the full armor of God so that you can stand your ground on the evil day and after you have done everything possible to still stand.
local: Nyini ti, am fa biɛsɔya neŋgem bo Nyɛmɛ afa ama am sana, adena saŋga kɛrɛ bo Sitana ba kun am luɛ, am koro kete i na am kunma i nahɔrɛ su, na am jina kenken.

eng: So stand with the belt of truth around your waist, justice as your breastplate.
local: Nyini ti, am kpa am ŋu, na am jina kenken, na am fa nahɔrɛ fa yo ka dambara bo am wii nu, na am yo sa bo i kɔ atin su saŋga kɛrɛ, nyini kanda am a, ka bulaari pɛpɛrɛpɛ bo am fa kanda am hoe su.

eng: and put shoes on your feet so that you are ready to spread the good news of peace.
local: Na am ma labari kpa n bo i ma ahoreda n yo ka gbagbaa bo am koro fa wura jina kenken.

eng: Above all, carry the shield of faith so that you can extinguish the flaming arrows of the evil one.
local: Am yoori nyini wieeri na am nya fa yarada yo deke bo am fa kanda de Sitana awiɛm kɛrɛ bo i tu bu na bu je ka sin ni.

eng: Take the helmet of salvation and the sword of the Spirit, which is Gods word.
local: Am fa tii­de n bo Nyɛmɛ afa ama am n yo ka bulaari kere bo am fa butu kanda am tii, na am fa Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ n yo ka takobe bo Awiɛwiɛ Casi n afa ama am.

eng: Offer prayers and petitions in the Spirit all the time. Stay alert by hanging in there and praying for all believers.
local: Am yoori nyinim kɛrɛ ni, am sere Nyɛmɛ ka i jina am sin buka am, na am susere i saŋga kɛrɛ, kabo Awiɛwiɛ Casi n kere am ka am sere i barasu ni. Nyini dɛɛ ti, saŋga kɛrɛ am sere i sɔ, má am daafi, na má am fa am ŋu ji, na am susere Nyɛmɛ ma i minɛm kɛrɛ.

eng: As for me, pray that when I open my mouth, Ill get a message that confidently makes this secret plan of the gospel known.
local: Am sere Nyɛmɛ ma m, na saŋga kɛrɛ bo m ŋa m jɔjɔ, na Nyɛmɛ ma m nɔaniɛ bo m jɔjɔ, adena m koro jɔjɔ ni ahoresi, na m koro teke m nɔɔ kan labari kpa n bo minɛm si má i n jɔrɛ n kere minɛm.

eng: Im an ambassador in chains for the sake of the gospel. Pray so that the Lord will give me the confidence to say what I have to say.
local: Dama Yesu Kristo ayi m ka m yo i jaramasa na m kan nyini labari kpa n jɔrɛ dɛɛ ti, ye m wo dan­saraka nu n a. Nyini ti, am sere Nyɛmɛ na i ma m ahoresi, na m kan labari kpa n jɔrɛ kere minɛm, kabo má i ti ye ni ka m kan kere bu ni.

eng: Tychicus, my loved brother and faithful servant of the Lord, can inform you about my situation and what Im doing.
local: Ya niwa Tikikusi bo ya koro i agaya na i la dabuŋu na i yo Mibiɛ n juma n ni, yiri bá kan m ŋusu jɔrɛ kɛrɛ kere am, na am si kabo m woo­wa ti barasu.

eng: Ive sent him for this reason—so that you will know about us. He can reassure you.
local: Nyini dɛɛ ti, ye m susunma i am dɔ a, adena am si kabo ya kɛrɛ woo­wa ti barasu, na i ma am ahoresi.

eng: May there be peace with the brothers and sisters as well as love with the faith that comes from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: M sere ya Si Nyɛmɛ ni ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo ka bu ma ya ninbaam kɛrɛ ahoreda, ni koro, ni yarada.

eng: May grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ forever.
local: Nyɛmɛ buka ambɛrɛ kɛrɛ bo am koro ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo n ni koro bo i la má awieeri ni.

eng: From Paul and Timothy, slaves of Christ Jesus. To all those in Philippi who are Gods people in Christ Jesus, along with your supervisors and servants.
local: Mini Pɔɔlu ni Timoti bo ya ti Yesu Kristo akɔɔm ni, yɛrɛ sukɛrɛ ahin kadasi n ma Nyɛmɛ minɛm bo bu wo Filipiya miɛ kpiri n nu ni, na ba de Yesu Kristo na bu ni yiri ayo kun ni, fa kɔ tu Kristo jama mɔ­fɔm, ni bu buka­fɔm kɛrɛ.

eng: May the grace and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ be with you.
local: Ya Si Nyɛmɛ, ni ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo buka am kɛrɛ na bu ma am ahoreda.

eng: I thank my God every time I mention you in my prayers.
local: Saŋga kɛrɛ bo m ba teŋge am jɔrɛ su, m da Nyɛmɛ asi ma am wɔ.

eng: Im thankful for all of you every time I pray, and its always a prayer full of joy.
local: Na saŋga kɛrɛ gusu bo m sere Nyɛmɛ ma am, m sere i ni ahorejɔ ɔ.

eng: Im glad because of the way you have been my partners in the ministry of the gospel from the time you first believed it until now.
local: dama fite cɛɛn n bo am deeri Kristo labari kpa haari ba ju ni nyuma ni, am abuka m bo ma koro akan Kristo labari kpa n jɔrɛ akere minɛm.

eng: Im sure about this: the one who started a good work in you will stay with you to complete the job by the day of Christ Jesus.
local: Nyini ti, m la ahoresi ka Nyɛmɛ wo am dɔ, yiri boori i bu yoori nyini sakpa ni am nu a, yiri súyo i sɔ a, haari kɔ ju cɛɛn n bo Yesu Kristo bá kaaki ba ni.

eng: I have good reason to think this way about all of you because I keep you in my heart. You are all my partners in Gods grace, both during my time in prison and in the defense and support of the gospel.
local: Saŋga kɛrɛ am jɔrɛ wo m ahore su wɔ, nyini ti, kabo m sunsun fa kɔ am dɔ ni, wɔ yo daka ka m yo sɔ. Dama am kɛrɛ abuka m fa kɔ juma n bo Nyɛmɛ afa ama m ka m yo i ni. Haari ni bo kisa m wo dan­saraka nu ni, wara saŋga bo m nati m koroya­nu ni, am bukaari m wɔ, na ma kan akere minɛ ka labari kpa n ti nahɔrɛ wɔ, adena bu yo yarada nahɔrɛ su.

eng: God is my witness that I feel affection for all of you with the compassion of Christ Jesus.
local: Nyɛmɛ di m daani ka am sa wo m ahore su saŋga kɛrɛ a, ka m koro am ni koro bo Yesu Kristo fa koro ya ni.

eng: This is my prayer: that your love might become even more and more rich with knowledge and all kinds of insight.
local: M nyɛmɛsere la ka, am sukoro am beŋgu buka su saŋga kɛrɛ, na am susi Nyɛmɛ atin n kɛrɛ, na am si nahɔrɛ atin.

eng: I pray this so that you will be able to decide what really matters and so you will be sincere and blameless on the day of Christ.
local: adena am si na am koro tambu yi deke bo i ti kpa nahɔrɛ su, na am yo casi na am la má ŋgasi be fa kɔ cɛɛn bo Kristo ba kaaki ba ni.

eng: I pray that you will then be filled with the fruit of righteousness, which comes from Jesus Christ, in order to give glory and praise to God.
local: Na m susere Nyɛmɛ ka Yesu Kristo buka am, na am wo wo kpa, na am suyo sakpa saŋga kɛrɛ, na minɛ ŋu i na bu kansi Nyɛmɛ na bu wura i kpiri.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to know that the things that have happened to me have actually advanced the gospel.
local: M ninbaam, m koro ka am si ka sa bo wɔ tu m na m wo dan­saraka n nu ti má tiɛ, nyini ma labari kpa n akoro abara ayɛ a.

eng: The whole Praetorian Guard and everyone else knows that Im in prison for Christ.
local: Nyini dɛɛ ti, tintini­jina­fɔm ni minɛm kɛrɛ bo bu wo fɛn n asi ka, m ti Kristo dɛɛ amusui­su­fɔ dɛɛ ti ye m wo dan­saraka nu a.

eng: Most of the brothers and sisters have had more confidence through the Lord to speak the word boldly and bravely because of my jail time.
local: M dan­saraka n nu woo­wa n awura ya ninbaam dɔŋgu kpɛrɛ kekereke Mibiɛ n dɛɛ ti, wɔ ma ba nya ahoresi abuka su bo bu koro sukan labari kpa n jɔrɛ saŋga kɛrɛ na bu soro má sɛrɛ.

eng: Some certainly preach Christ with jealous and competitive motives, but others preach with good motives.
local: Nahɔrɛ, kɔrɛsi ni akuruwa se ti, ye bu nbem kan Kristo labari kpa n jɔrɛ n a, ama, nbem gusu kan i ni akunnu fofoe wɔ.

eng: They are motivated by love, because they know that Im put here to give a defense of the gospel.
local: Bɛrɛ n bo bu yo i ni akunnu fofoe ni, Nyɛmɛ koro ti ye bu yo sɔ n a, dama bu si ka Nyɛmɛ ma m wo fɛn a, na m tu ŋgoni fa kɔ Kristo labari kpa n jɔrɛ su.

eng: the others preach Christ because of their selfish ambition. They are insincere, hoping to cause me more pain while Im in prison.
local: Nyiŋgam ni, bu kan má Kristo labari kpa n jɔrɛ ni bu sunsunni kpa, ama bu bita anyii sunsunni wɔ, adena bu má m di wahara dan­saraka n nu.

eng: What do I think about this? Just this: since Christ is proclaimed in every possible way, whether from dishonest or true motives, Im glad and Ill continue to be glad.
local: Nyini n kɛrɛ bo bu suyo i ni, i be mmɔɔ kpiɛ má m daafiri. Ama, deke bo i yo m fiɛ n la ka, bu ma Kristo labari kpa ni susandi bara yɛ buka su wɔ. Nzɛn bu kan má i ni bu sunsunni kpa, wara bu kan i ni bu akunnu fofoe, m dɛɛ la ka, saŋga kɛrɛ m ahore ti jɔɔ­wa.

eng: Im glad because I know that this will result in my release through your prayers and the help of the Spirit of Jesus Christ.
local: Dama m si ka nyɛmɛsere bo am sere Nyɛmɛ ma m saŋga kɛrɛ n ni buka bo m nya i fite Yesu Kristo Awiɛwiɛ Casi n dɔ ni, nyini ma m nya m tii a.

eng: It is my expectation and hope that I wont be put to shame in anything. Rather, I hope with daring courage that Christs greatness will be seen in my body, now as always, whether I live or die.
local: M fa ahoresi ni tama yo m juma ni anyum­boro saŋga kɛrɛ, na má nyinsɛ ti m, adena nzɛn m wuuri, ni bo ma wu má kɛrɛ, m woo­wa koro ma minɛ kansi Kristo dɛɛ duma.

eng: Because for me, living serves Christ and dying is even better.
local: Mini dɔ, nzɛn m la ŋgɔɔ, Kristo dɛɛ ti a, nzɛn ma wu, i ti m kpɛrɛ wɔ.

eng: If I continue to live in this world, I get results from my work.
local: Ama, nzɛn m toko la ŋgɔɔ ahin durunya n nu fɛn na m koro yo sa bo i kun kpɛrɛ Nyɛmɛ dɔ, nyini yiri, m si má bo m yi ahin deke nnyɔm nu.

eng: But I dont know what I prefer. Im torn between the two because I want to leave this life and be with Christ, which is far better.
local: Ma ka afiɛn ni afiɛn wɔ, dama m koro ka má m wu wɔ na m kɔ wo Kristo dɔ, m ŋu ka nyini n ti ye tara durunya n nu fɛn bo m wo ni.

eng: However, its more important for me to stay in this world for your sake.
local: Ama, nzɛn m kaaki niɛ bekun a, ambɛrɛ dɛɛ ti, i ti ye ni ka má m wu, ama, m wo ni m ŋgɔɔ durunya n nu fɛn.

eng: Im sure of this: I will stay alive and remain with all of you to help your progress and the joy of your faith.
local: Tɔ. Nyini dɛɛ ti, m si tenle su ka m wú má kisa, m wó bɛrɛ wɔ, na m búka am na am koro yo Kristo yarada ni nahɔrɛ, na am ahore jɔ.

eng: and to increase your pride in Christ Jesus through my presence when I visit you again.
local: Adena nzɛn m ba kaaki ba niɛɛri am busu bekun, nyini saŋga, am lá deke bo am koro fa kansi Yesu Kristo, fa kɔ sa n bo wɔ yo ama m ni.

eng: Most important, live together in a manner worthy of Christs gospel. Do this, whether I come and see you or Im absent and hear about you. Do this so that you stand firm, united in one spirit and mind as you struggle together to remain faithful to the gospel.
local: Tɔ, kisa, jɔrɛ kɛrɛ bo i wo bɛrɛ la ka, am ma am woo­wa ti kabo Kristo labari kpa n kere ka am wo barasu ni, na nzɛn m ba koro ba niɛɛri am busu, wara ma koro aba má n kɛrɛ, na m ti am jɔrɛ ka Awiɛwiɛ Casi n ma am la jinakun­su, na am la sunsunni kun ni anɔɔsɛ, suboro am nyi sutu ŋgoni kan Kristo labari kpa n jɔrɛ kere minɛm na bu yo yarada.

eng: That way, you wont be afraid of anything your enemies do. Your faithfulness and courage are a sign of their coming destruction and your salvation, which is from God.
local: Na má am soro sɛrɛ fa kɔ am kpɔ­fɔm dɔ, am ma am ahore ti sii­wa saŋga kɛrɛ, nyini má bu ŋu nu na bu sí ka bu ká ŋgbɛɛn a, ama, ambɛrɛ yiri, am nyá tii­de, dama Nyɛmɛ má am nyá tii­de a.

eng: God has generously granted you the privilege, not only of believing in Christ but also of suffering for Christs sake.
local: Dama Nyɛmɛ ace am aceeri Kristo dɛɛ ti, ka am yo Kristo yarada, má nyini ŋgumi, ama, am kaaki di wahara ma i.

eng: You are having the same struggle that you saw me face and now hear that Im still facing.
local: Nyini ti, kisa am koro buka m na ya kɛrɛ kun nyini luɛ ni. Yiri ye am yo ŋuuri ka m tu i ŋgoni n a, ye kisa am ti ka m toko tu i ŋgoni n a.

eng: Therefore, if there is any encouragement in Christ, any comfort in love, any sharing in the Spirit, any sympathy.
local: Kristo wo am nu n dɛɛ ti, yiri ma am ahore si a, na i dɛɛ koro bo i fa koro am ni, da am ahore. Am ni Awiɛwiɛ Casi n la wo fiɛ, am yo sakpa na am si am beŋgum aŋunfɔ.

eng: complete my joy by thinking the same way, having the same love, being united, and agreeing with each other.
local: Nyini dɛɛ ti, m sere am wɔ, jande, am kɛrɛ fa sunsunni kun, na am koro am beŋgu, na am fa anɔɔsɛ, na m ahorejɔ kɔ́ sin su.

eng: Dont do anything for selfish purposes, but with humility think of others as better than yourselves.
local: Má am sunsun kabo am yo na ambɛrɛ ŋgumi nya i, má am wura am ŋu kpiri, ama, am yo am ŋu kaan, am bu am beŋgu ka bu tara am.

eng: Instead of each person watching out for their own good, watch out for what is better for others.
local: Má am niɛ kabo am yo na ambɛrɛ ŋgumi yo ye, ama, am niɛ kabo am yo na am beŋgum gusu yo ye.

eng: Adopt the attitude that was in Christ Jesus.
local: Am ma am sunsunni ti kabo Yesu Kristo dɛɛ ti barasu ni.

eng: Though he was in the form of God, he did not consider being equal with God something to exploit.
local: I woo­wa ti kabo Nyɛmɛ woo­wa ti n wɔ saŋga kɛrɛ, ama, wɔ se má cɛɛn be ka i tú ŋgoni wura i ŋu kpiri na i ni Nyɛmɛ sɛ.

eng: But he emptied himself by taking the form of a slave and by becoming like human beings. When he found himself in the form of a human.
local: ama, i keteeri nyini n kɛrɛ bo má i ti i dɛɛ n wɔ, na wɔ fa i ŋu ayo akɔɔ, na wɔ kaaki adamande. I woo­wa ti kabo adamande woo­wa ti barasu n wɔ.

eng: he humbled himself by becoming obedient to the point of death, even death on a cross.
local: i yoori i ŋu kaan wɔ, na wɔ de Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ ni, haari na wɔ wu yiwee tiɛ, yiri la bo bu kpamaari i baka jaanu n su ni.

eng: Therefore, God highly honored him and gave him a name above all names.
local: Nyini dɛɛ ti, ye Nyɛmɛ awura i kpiri agaya ayɛ i su aŋgoro ama i duma bo i tara duma kɛrɛ n a.

eng: so that at the name of Jesus everyone in heaven, on earth, and under the earth might bow.
local: adena minɛ ni deke kɛrɛ bo bu wo aŋgoro, ni bo bu wo durunya n nu fɛn, ni bo bu wo asiɛn bu n tiiri Yesu duma ni, bu kútu i na bu sú i.

eng: and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
local: Na sɔnɔ kɛrɛ teke i nɔɔ kan ka Yesu Kristo ti deke n kɛrɛ Mibiɛ a, nyini wura ya Si Nyɛmɛ kpiri a.

eng: Therefore, my loved ones, just as you always obey me, not just when I am present but now even more while I am away, carry out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
local: Nyini dɛɛ ti, m ninbaa koroo­wam, am yo deeri m nɔaniɛ n wɔ saŋga kɛrɛ, kisa bo m wo má am dɔ ni, nyini ti ye ni ka am de m nɔaniɛ n tara kabo m yo wo am dɔ n a. Tii­de n bo am anya i n dɛɛ ti, am yo Nyɛmɛ juma n ni anyum­boro, bo i kere ka am anya tii­de, na am soro Nyɛmɛ.

eng: God is the one who enables you both to want and to actually live out his good purposes.
local: Dama Nyɛmɛ suyo i juma am ahore su a, na i ma am de i nɔaniɛ ni, na am yo i koroo­wa.

eng: Do everything without grumbling and arguing.
local: Deke kɛrɛ bo am yo i ni, má am ŋuŋuti na am se akuruwa.

eng: so that you may be blameless and pure, innocent children of God surrounded by people who are crooked and corrupt. Among these people you shine like stars in the world.
local: adena am yo minɛ casim bo be koro jaraki má am, na am yo Nyɛmɛ nbaam bo am la má ŋgasi be na am ma am woo­wa ti wein, na am wo nyuma­fɔ satiɛ­yo­fɔ ŋgbɛɛnm n nu, na am ta ka asara­mbaam.

eng: because you hold on to the word of life. This will allow me to say on the day of Christ that I havent run for nothing or worked for nothing.
local: Na am bita Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ ni, yiri ma minɛm ŋgɔɔ a. Nzɛn am yo sɔ, nyini ma m koro bo m hoe fa kɔ am woo­wa n su a, cɛɛn n bo Kristo bá kaaki ba ni, na m si ka juma n bo m yiiri anyum­boro yoori am nu ni, aka má ŋgbɛɛn.

eng: But even if I am poured out like a drink offering upon the altar of service for your faith, I am glad. Im glad with all of you.
local: Kabo am ayo Kristo yarada, na am sukun am ŋu yo i juma n ni nahɔrɛ su ni, na haari nzɛn m wuuri mmɔɔ na am yarada buka su, m ahore ti jɔɔ­wa, na i yo m ni ambɛrɛ kɛrɛ fiɛ.

eng: You should be glad about this in the same way. Be glad with me!.
local: am gusu ma am ahore jɔ kabo m ahore ti jɔɔ­wa barasu ni.

eng: I hope in the Lord Jesus to send Timothy to see you soon so that I may be encouraged by hearing about you.
local: Nzɛn ya Mibiɛ Yesu soro su, m la ahoresi ka i cɛ má, m súnma Timoti am dɔ na i ba niɛ am busu, na i ba kaaki baari, na m gusu tí kabo am wo ti na m ahore da.

eng: I have no one like him. He is a person who genuinely cares about your well-being.
local: Deke bo i ti na m sunma i am dɔ n la ka, be cɛcɛ wo má am nu, yiri ŋgumi ti bo i buka m su bo i cɛcɛ wo am nu a.

eng: All the others put their own business ahead of Jesus Christs business.
local: Bo ba ka n kɛrɛ, bu cɛcɛ wo má Kristo juma n nu, se bu cɛcɛ wo bu sa koroo­wam nu a.

eng: You know his character, how he labors with me for the gospel like a son works with his father.
local: Ambɛrɛ mmɔɔ ni am tii si ka Timoti woo­wa kere kabo i su Nyɛmɛ atin n su ni nahɔrɛ su, na am si ka m ni yiri saŋga yo juma kabo baa ni i si bo su yo juma n wɔ, adena minɛ dɔŋgu de labari kpa ni na bu yo yarada.

eng: So he is the one that I hope to send as soon as I find out how things turn out here for me.
local: Nyini ti, nzɛn m ŋuuri m jɔrɛ n kɛrɛ nyaari, m súnma i kisa bɛrɛ na i ba niɛ am busu.

eng: I trust in the Lord that I also will visit you soon.
local: Nzɛn Mibiɛ n soro su, m la ahoresi ka i cɛ́ má, mini mmɔɔ ni m tii bá niɛ am busu.

eng: I think it is also necessary to send Epaphroditus to you. He is my brother, coworker, and fellow soldier; and he is your representative who serves my needs.
local: Ma ŋu ka, i ti ye ni ka m súnma ya niwa Ipaforoditosi am dɔ. M ni yiri saŋga yo juma na ya ti ka sojam bo bu buka bu beŋgu luɛ n nu wɔ, ya Mibiɛ Yesu dɛɛ atin su. Na ambɛrɛ ni am tii sunmaari i m dɔ, na wɔ ba abuka m ni deke kɛrɛ bo m koro ni.

eng: He misses you all, and he was upset because you heard he was sick.
local: I wara ado am, ka i ba niɛ am busu, i ahore akaaki asaaki, dama am yo tiiri ka wɔ da tukpaki.

eng: In fact, he was so sick that he nearly died. But God had mercy on him—and not just on him but also on me, because his death would have caused me great sorrow.
local: Nahɔrɛ, i tukpaki n wuraari i, kaan sɔ, má wɔ wu. Ama, na Nyɛmɛ asi i aŋunfɔ, má yiri ŋgumi, m ni yiri kɛrɛ, adena má m ahore saaki buka su.

eng: Therefore, I am sending him immediately so that when you see him again you can be glad and I wont worry.
local: Nyini dɛɛ ti, ye m koro ka i ba am dɔ ndende, na am ŋu i na am ahore kaaki jɔ bekun, na má m ahore saaki kun.

eng: So welcome him in the Lord with great joy and show great respect for people like him.
local: Am de i ni am saa nnyɔ ni ahorejɔ, Mibiɛ n dɛɛ ti. Na am bu minɛm kɛrɛ bo bu woo­wa ti kabo i woo­wa ti barasu ni.

eng: He risked his life and almost died for the work of Christ, and he did this to make up for the help you couldnt give me.
local: Dama Yesu Kristo dɛɛ juma n dɛɛ ti, i yo tɔɔri i ŋgɔɔ ɔ, má wɔ ka kaan sɔ na i wu. I yoori sɔ ni, adena i buka m na i yo deke n bo am akoro ayo má i ni.

eng: So then, my brothers and sisters, be glad in the Lord. Its no trouble for me to repeat the same things to you because they will help keep you on track.
local: M ninbaam, jɔrɛ bo i wo bɛrɛ la ka, am ma am ahore jɔ kabo am ni Mibiɛ n ayo kun ni. I ti ye ni ka m kaaki kɛrɛ na m teŋge am su fa kɔ kabo m yo kɛrɛ seeri am ni, dama i ti deke bo i buka am wɔ, na má am wura kekereke nu.

eng: Watch out for the dogs. Watch out for people who do evil things. Watch out for those who insist on circumcision, which is really mutilation.
local: Am si am ŋu sa, ni minɛm bo bu ti satiɛ­yo­fɔm na bu ti ka caam ni, na bu ŋa nzɛn sɔnɔ awura má kɛnkɛnnɛ, i nya má tii­de ni.

eng: We are the circumcision. We are the ones who serve by Gods Spirit and who boast in Christ Jesus. We dont put our confidence in rituals performed on the body.
local: Yɛrɛ ti Nyɛmɛ minɛm bo ba wura kɛnkɛnnɛ nahɔrɛ su a, má bɛrɛ, dama Nyɛmɛ Awiɛwiɛ Casi ni buka ya ye ya koro su Nyɛmɛ na ya la ahorejɔ a, fa kɔ kabo ya ni Yesu Kristo ayo kun ni. Nyini ti, ya daafi má sa­yoo­wa be ŋu fa kɔ aŋuniɛ­mbaa su.

eng: though I have good reason to have this kind of confidence. If anyone else has reason to put their confidence in physical advantages, I have even more.
local: Mini ni m tii, má m la atin bo m koro se ka m daafi m ŋu fa kɔ sa­yoo­wam su. Nzɛn be ŋa i la atin, na i daafi i ŋu fa kɔ nyini sa­yoo­wam su, má m koro se ka, m la atin tara i mi fieo.

eng: I was circumcised on the eighth day. I am from the people of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a Hebrew of the Hebrews. With respect to observing the Law, Im a Pharisee.
local: Bu wuuri m ni, m le­mɔcuɛ cɛɛn bu wuraari m kɛnkɛnnɛ wɔ. M ti Yisareli­fɔ baa a, na m fite Bɛnjamin dɛɛ lɛɛ anɔ n nu wɔ, na m ti Hiburu­fɔm anuma a nahɔrɛ su. M yo ti Farasi­fɔm kun wɔ, na m su Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ kpamaa­wa n su kabo i ti ye ni ka bu su i su barasu ni.

eng: With respect to devotion to the faith, I harassed the church. With respect to righteousness under the Law, Im blameless.
local: M yo bita i ni anyum­boro wɔ, kabo m yo na m kere Kristo jama n wuwuruwa ni. Fa kɔ kabo sɔnɔ de Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ kpamaa­wa n na i su i su nahɔrɛ su, mini la má ŋgasi be.

eng: These things were my assets, but I wrote them off as a loss for the sake of Christ.
local: Ama, nyini deke n kɛrɛ bo m yo buuri bu ka bu la kpɛrɛ ma m ni, Kristo dɛɛ ti, ma ŋu ka bu kɛrɛ ti ŋgbɛɛn wɔ kisa.

eng: But even beyond that, I consider everything a loss in comparison with the superior value of knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have lost everything for him, but what I lost I think of as sewer trash, so that I might gain Christ.
local: I ti nahɔrɛ wɔ ka, ma ŋu ka deke n kɛrɛ ti ŋgbɛɛn wɔ, adena m koro si m Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo, yiri tara deke n kɛrɛ a. Yiri dɛɛ ti, ma yaki deke n kɛrɛ bo m yo yoori bu n ka bu ti ŋgbɛɛn wɔ. M niɛ bu kɛrɛ ka wura a, adena m koro de Kristo ni m saa nnyɔ.

eng: and be found in him. In Christ I have a righteousness that is not my own and that does not come from the Law but rather from the faithfulness of Christ. It is the righteousness of God that is based on faith.
local: na m ni yiri yo deke kun nahɔrɛ su. Kisa m koro se má ka m yo sa bo i kɔ atin su Nyɛmɛ dɔ, kabo Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ kpamaa­wa n kere ni, ama, kisa, kabo ma yo Kristo yarada n dɛɛ ti, ye Nyɛmɛ de m ka m yo sa bo i kɔ atin su i dɔ a. Deke n bo i ma i de m ka m yo sa bo i kɔ atin su i dɔ n la bo ma yo i yarada n wɔ.

eng: The righteousness that I have comes from knowing Christ, the power of his resurrection, and the participation in his sufferings. It includes being conformed to his death.
local: Deke bo m koro i n kɛrɛ la ka, m sí Kristo, na m nyá i yiko n bo i koro teŋgeeri i yiwee n nu ni, na m dí i dɛɛ wahara n bo i diiri n be, na m wú i dɛɛ yiwee n be.

eng: so that I may perhaps reach the goal of the resurrection of the dead.
local: Nyini ma m la tama ka mini gusu téŋge m yiwee nu a.

eng: Its not that I have already reached this goal or have already been perfected, but I pursue it, so that I may grab hold of it because Christ grabbed hold of me for just this purpose.
local: M suse má ka ma du mɔ aju su na m ti kabo Nyɛmɛ koro ka m ti ni, wara ma du mɔ ayo casi wɔ, ama, m toko boro m nyi wɔ, adena m nya deke n bo i ti na Yesu Kristo afa m ayo i dɛɛ sɔnɔ ni.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I myself dont think Ive reached it, but I do this one thing: I forget about the things behind me and reach out for the things ahead of me.
local: M ninbaam, mini ni m tii suse má ka ma ju su kabo i koro ka m woo­wa ti barasu n wɔ, se deke kun ye m nyunu aboro i su a, m wara afi dekem kɛrɛ bo m yo yoori bu n sa, ama, m sukoro ka m boro m nyi wɔ, na m saa kan deke n bo i wo m nyunu ni.

eng: The goal I pursue is the prize of Gods upward call in Christ Jesus.
local: Nyini ti, m miɛ m nyi wɔ na m kɔ m nyunu, adena m kɔ ŋu i awieeri, na m nya aceeri n bo Nyɛmɛ afere m ama m ŋgɔɔ i dɔ ni, Yesu Kristo dɛɛ ti.

eng: So all of us who are spiritually mature should think this way, and if anyone thinks differently, God will reveal it to him or her.
local: I ti ye ni ka yɛrɛ kɛrɛ bo ya yarada ti bii­wa ni, ya nyunu boro fa kɔ nyini dika. Na nzɛn am sunsunni ba woori i ŋguŋgumi, fa kɔ i nɔaniɛ n su, Nyɛmɛ yí i nyi kere am, na am tí i bu.

eng: Only lets live in a way that is consistent with whatever level we have reached.
local: Ama, bo i wo bɛrɛ la ka, kabo ya bita Nyɛmɛ atin ba ju haari ni nyuma ni, am ma ya toko bita i sɔ.

eng: Brothers and sisters, become imitators of me and watch those who live this way—you can use us as models.
local: M ninbaam, am ma am woo­wa ti kabo m dɛɛ n ti barasu ni. Woo­wa kpa n bo ya du mɔ afa akere am ni, am niɛ minɛm bo bu bita nyini woo­wa kpa n ni, na am sɔn bu su.

eng: As I have told you many times and now say with deep sadness, many people live as enemies of the cross.
local: Dama saŋga kɛrɛ m nati se am ka, nbem woo­wa kere ka bu ti Kristo kpɔ­fɔm wɔ, fa kɔ i yiwee n bo i wuuri i baka jaanu n su ni. Ye kisa m kaaki suse am bekun ni nyunvuin n a.

eng: Their lives end with destruction. Their god is their stomach, and they take pride in their disgrace because their thoughts focus on earthly things.
local: Nyini minɛm sɔ, bu nyɛmɛ la bu kunnu wɔ, na deke bo má i ti bu nyinsɛ ni, bu fa nyini fa yo yanfɔya. Bu sunsunni kɛrɛ wo durunya n nu fɛn neŋgem ŋgumi sɔ a, nyini ti, bu awieeri, bu ká ŋgbɛɛn wɔ.

eng: Our citizenship is in heaven. We look forward to a savior that comes from there—the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ama, yɛrɛ yiri, ya ti Nyɛmɛ dika n bo i wo aŋgoro n nu nbaam wɔ, ye ya suŋminda ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo, ya Tii­de­fɔ ni, ni anyum­boro, ka i fíte Nyɛmɛ dika n bo i wo aŋgoro n nu ba.

eng: He will transform our humble bodies so that they are like his glorious body, by the power that also makes him able to subject all things to himself.
local: Na i bá kaaki ya ahin aŋuniɛ n bo i wú ni, na i má i yo aŋuniɛ fɔfɔrɛ barasu be bo i ti kabo i dɛɛ aŋuniɛ woo­wa n bo i la jirima n ti barasu ni. I fá i yiko n bo i fa niɛ deke n kɛrɛ su ni fá yo nyini kɛrɛ a.

eng: Therefore, my brothers and sisters whom I love and miss, who are my joy and crown, stand firm in the Lord. Loved ones.
local: M ninbaam, m koro am agaya, na m ahore abi ka m ŋu am ni, ambɛrɛ ti, ye m ahore ti jɔɔ­wa saŋga kɛrɛ a, ambɛrɛ ti m kpɛrɛ bo ma di i m juma­yoo­wa n nu a. Nyini ti, am bita Mibiɛ n dɛɛ atin n ni nahɔrɛ su.

eng: I urge Euodia and I urge Syntyche to come to an agreement in the Lord.
local: Yuwodiya, ni Sintiki, m sere am wɔ jande, ka, am fa anɔɔsɛ, dama am ti nibaam wɔ, Mibiɛ n dɛɛ ti.

eng: Yes, and Im also asking you, loyal friend, to help these women who have struggled together with me in the ministry of the gospel, along with Clement and the rest of my coworkers whose names are in the scroll of life.
local: Tɔ, wɔrɔ gusu bo a ti m mata­fɔ nahɔrɛ su ni, m sere u wɔ, ka, a buka nyini nbara nnyɔm ni, dama bɛrɛ yiiri anyum­boro bukaari m, ye ya kaanri labari kpa n jɔrɛ n a, fa saŋga ni Kerementi, ni nyiŋgam bo m ni bɛrɛ saŋga yo juma ni. Nyɛmɛ akɛrɛ bu kɛrɛ duma awura ŋgɔɔ kadasi n nu.

eng: Be glad in the Lord always! Again I say, be glad!.
local: Ya Mibiɛ n dɛɛ ti, am ma am ahore jɔ saŋga kɛrɛ, m kaaki suse am bekun wɔ ka, am ma am ahore jɔ.

eng: Let your gentleness show in your treatment of all people. The Lord is near.
local: Am ma sɔnɔ kɛrɛ ŋu ka am ti bɛnlɛ, dama Mibiɛ ni káaki ba kisa.

eng: Dont be anxious about anything; rather, bring up all of your requests to God in your prayers and petitions, along with giving thanks.
local: Má am koko fa kɔ deke be su, ama, am kan am sa bo i ti am miɛɛ­wa kɛrɛ fa kere Nyɛmɛ saŋga kɛrɛ, na am sere i, na am da i asi am ahore su.

eng: Then the peace of God that exceeds all understanding will keep your hearts and minds safe in Christ Jesus.
local: Am yoori sɔ, Nyɛmɛ má am ahoreda bo i la má aŋusu, na i súniɛ am dika fa kɔ am ahore su ni am sunsunni nu, dama am ni Yesu Kristo ayo kun n dɛɛ ti.

eng: From now on, brothers and sisters, if anything is excellent and if anything is admirable, focus your thoughts on these things: all that is true, all that is holy, all that is just, all that is pure, all that is lovely, and all that is worthy of praise.
local: M ninbaam, jɔrɛ n bo wɔ ka n la ka, am ma am sunsunni kɛrɛ wo dekem bo bu ti kpa, na bu la kansi n su. Bɛrɛ la deke bo i ti nahɔrɛ, ni bo i la anyunuyi, ni sa bo i kɔ atin su, ni bo i ti casi, ni bo i ti koro sa, ni bo i la jirima.

eng: Practice these things: whatever you learned, received, heard, or saw in us. The God of peace will be with you.
local: Dekem bo am sɔnsɔn bu fiteeri m dɔ ni, ni bo am deeri m dɔ ni, bɛrɛ la m nɔaniɛ ni, ni m sa­yoo­wa ni, am su bu su na am fa yo juma. Nyɛmɛ la ahoreda, yiri wó am dɔ a.

eng: I was very glad in the Lord because now at last you have shown concern for me again.
local: Ya Mibiɛ n dɛɛ ti, m ahore ajɔ akɔ asin su, dama wɔ cɛ bo m ti má am ŋga, ama, kisa am akaaki akere ka am cɛcɛ wo m nu. M si ka saŋga kɛrɛ am cɛcɛ wo m dɔ, se kabo am yo na am buka m n ye am anya má atin a.

eng: Im not saying this because I need anything, for I have learned how to be content in any circumstance.
local: Bo m suse sɔ ni, i ti má ka deke be miɛ m wɔ ye m sukan sɔ n a, dama nzɛn m la i, ni bo m la má i kɛrɛ, m si kabo m tara m ŋu na m wo barasu.

eng: I know the experience of being in need and of having more than enough; I have learned the secret to being content in any and every circumstance, whether full or hungry or whether having plenty or being poor.
local: M si kabo yaari ti sɔnɔ na i ti barasu, na m kaaki si kabo sɔnɔ nya i agaya na i ti barasu. Deke kɛrɛ bo m wo, na sa be atu m, nzɛn m di na m kunnu yi o, wara nzɛn m da ahɔɛ o, nzɛn m la neŋge beberebe o, wara i ti kaan o, m si kabo m tara m ŋu barasu na m nyunu yi i.

eng: I can endure all these things through the power of the one who gives me strength.
local: Yesu Kristo maari m faŋga n dɛɛ ti ye m koro yo deke n kɛrɛ a.

eng: Still, you have done well to share my distress.
local: Ama, am ayo sakpa, kabo miɛ tuuri m na m ni ambɛrɛ kɛrɛ saŋga di wahara ni.

eng: You Philippians know from the time of my first mission work in Macedonia how no church shared in supporting my ministry except you.
local: Ambɛrɛ Filipiya­fɔm si ka fite saŋga bo m boori i bu ba kaanri labari kpa n jɔrɛ kereeri am ni, nyini sin, na m ba fiteeri Makɛdoniya awɔrɛ n nu ni, Kristo jama kun n kpein be mmɔɔ ace má m aceeri be, má ka ambɛrɛ ŋgumi ceeri m aceeri a.

eng: You sent contributions repeatedly to take care of my needs even while I was in Thessalonica.
local: Saŋga bo m toko wo Tɛsalonika miɛ kpiri n nu ni, na miɛ tuuri m ni, am yo sunmaari m dɔ ni aceeri kpe nnyɔ.

eng: Im not hoping for a gift, but I am hoping for a profit that accumulates in your account.
local: I ti má ka m koro ka saŋga kɛrɛ m sude aceeri fite am dɔ ɔ, ama, m koro ka am yo sɔ, na Nyɛmɛ yo am kisi.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will, and Timothy our brother.
local: Mini Pɔɔlu bo Nyɛmɛ dɛɛ koroya­nu na m ti Yesu Kristo jaramasa ni, m ni ya niwa Timoti.

eng: I now have plenty and it is more than enough. I am full to overflowing because I received the gifts that you sent from Epaphroditus. Those gifts give off a fragrant aroma, an acceptable sacrifice that pleases God.
local: Deke n kɛrɛ bo am fa sunmaari m dɔ ni, m saa akan i, am ace m atara kabo má m koro ni mmɔɔ. Kisa m koro má pui kun, dama Ipaforoditosi afa am aceeri n kɛrɛ aba ama m. I ti ka yoo­wa bo ba yo i ama Nyɛmɛ na wɔ sun i nu ade i ni akunnujɔ wɔ.

eng: My God will meet your every need out of his riches in the glory that is found in Christ Jesus.
local: M Nyɛmɛ Fɛmɛ ni, yiri la neŋge ni ajɛkɛ kɛrɛ a, i kɛrɛ wo Yesu Kristo dɛɛ jirima nu wɔ, i má am deke kɛrɛ bo am fun i.

eng: To the holy and faithful brothers and sisters in Christ in Colossae. Grace and peace to you from God our Father.
local: sukɛrɛ ahin kadasi n ma Nyɛmɛ minɛm bo wɔ yi bu Kolosiya miɛ kpiri n nu n a, na bu ti ya ninbaam bo bu su Kristo su nahɔrɛ su ni. Ya Si Nyɛmɛ buka am na i ma am ahoreda.

eng: We always give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you.
local: Saŋga kɛrɛ ya sere Nyɛmɛ ma am wɔ, yiri ti ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo Si a, na ya da i asi fa kɔ kabo am woo­wa ti barasu n wɔ.

eng: Let glory be given to God our Father forever and always. Amen.
local: Ya Si Nyɛmɛ ni, yiri ti ye ni ka ya kansi i saŋga kɛrɛ saŋga. Ami.

eng: Weve done this since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all Gods people.
local: dama ya ti kabo am ayo Yesu Kristo yarada, ni kabo am koro Nyɛmɛ minɛm kɛrɛ barasu ni.

eng: You have this faith and love because of the hope reserved for you in heaven. You previously heard about this hope through the true message, the good news.
local: Deke n bo i ti na am yoori sɔ n la ka, am la ahoresi ka am nyá deke n bo Nyɛmɛ afa ase aŋgoro ka i fá ma am ni. Am du mɔ tiiri nyini ahoresi n jɔrɛ saŋga bo minɛm ba kaanri labari kpa n bo i ti nahɔrɛ n jɔrɛ kereeri am n wɔ. Labari kpa n bo am deeri i ni, wɔ tɛrɛki abara ayɛ durunya n kɛrɛ, minɛ ade i, bu suyo sakpa durunya n kɛrɛ nu. Fite saŋga bo am tiiri i ni, am deeri i ye am siiri sakpa n bo Nyɛmɛ ayo ama am ni nahɔrɛ su n a.

eng: Greet all Gods people in Christ Jesus. The brothers and sisters with me send you their greeting.
local: Am bisa Nyɛmɛ minɛm kɛrɛ dɔŋgu ma m. Bɛrɛ ti Yesu Kristo dɛɛm a. Ya ninbaam bo bu wo m dɔ fɛn n bisa am kɛrɛ dɔŋgu.

eng: All Gods people here, especially those in Caesars household, send you their greeting.
local: Nyɛmɛ minɛm kɛrɛ bisa am dɔŋgu, maala bo bu yo juma Roma­fɔm Fɛmɛ Kpiri Siza dika ni.

eng: You learned it from Epaphras, who is the fellow slave we love and Christs faithful minister for your sake.
local: Ya lamɔkɔ akɔɔ Ipafarasi bo ya koro i ni, yiri du mɔ kereeri am ahin labari kpa n a. Yiri ti Kristo amusui­su­fɔ bo i la dabuŋu na i yo i juma buka am a.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirits.
local: Ya Mibiɛ Yesu Kristo buka am kɛrɛ.

eng: He informed us of your love in the Spirit.
local: yiri seeri ya kabo Nyɛmɛ Awiɛwiɛ Casi n abuka am na am koro minɛm barasu n a.

eng: Because of this, since the day we heard about you, we havent stopped praying for you and asking for you to be filled with the knowledge of Gods will, with all wisdom and spiritual understanding.
local: Nyini ti, fite cɛɛn bo ya tiiri kabo Nyɛmɛ ayo sakpa n ama am ni, saŋga kɛrɛ ya sere Nyɛmɛ ma am wɔ, ka i ma am si nahɔrɛ su kabo i koro ka am yo barasu ni, na i kaaki ma Awiɛwiɛ Casi ma am nya si ni alecira barasu kɛrɛ.

eng: Were praying this so that you can live lives that are worthy of the Lord and pleasing to him in every way: by producing fruit in every good work and growing in the knowledge of God.
local: Nyini ma am koro wo kabo i ti ye ni ka Ya Mibiɛ minɛm wo barasu n a, na am yo kabo i koro n kɛrɛ, na am yo sakpa barasu barasu kɛrɛ, na am si Nyɛmɛ nahɔrɛ su buka su.

eng: by being strengthened through his glorious might so that you endure everything and have patience.
local: Ya kaaki sere Nyɛmɛ ka i ma i jirima ni i yiko n bo i la má aŋusu n ma am faŋga barasu kɛrɛ, na am koro mindi, na am la sawɔrɛ fa kɔ kekereke kɛrɛ bo i tu am, ni ahorejɔ.

eng: and by giving thanks with joy to the Father. He made it so you could take part in the inheritance, in light granted to Gods holy people.
local: Na am da ya Si Nyɛmɛ asi, dama yiri ama am ayo minɛm bo am aju su ka am saŋga nya deke n bo i fá ma i minɛm bo bu wo wein n nu ni.

eng: He rescued us from the control of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son he loves.
local: Yiri ye wɔ yi ya afite awosin dɛɛ fɛmɛya yiko n kɛrɛ nu, ye wɔ fa ya awura i Wa koroo­wa n dɛɛ fɛmɛya n nu a.

eng: He set us free through the Son and forgave our sins.
local: Yiri Kristo dɛɛ ti, ya nya tii­de, ye wɔ fa ya satiɛ ace ya.

eng: The Son is the image of the invisible God, the one who is first over all creation.
local: Kabo Nyɛmɛ bo ya ŋu má i n woo­wa ti ni, yiri Kristo woo­wa ti sɔ ɔ, yiri ti Nyɛmɛ Wa kpiɛn n bo i ti deke kɛrɛ bo Nyɛmɛ ayi bu n tii a.

eng: Because all things were created by him: both in the heavens and on the earth, the things that are visible and the things that are invisible. Whether they are thrones or powers, or rulers or authorities, all things were created through him and for him.
local: Yiri ye Nyɛmɛ maari i yiiri deke kɛrɛ bo i wo aŋgoro ni asiɛŋgu n a, ni dekem bo ya ŋu bu, ni bo ya ŋu má bu ni, ni yiko­fɔm kɛrɛ, ni nfaŋga­fɔm, ni nfɛmɛm kɛrɛ. Nyɛmɛ maari yiri yiiri deke n kɛrɛ a, adena deke n kɛrɛ wura i kpiri.

eng: He existed before all things, and all things are held together in him.
local: Yiri du mɔ woori bɛrɛ wɔ ka, ye Nyɛmɛ nya ba yiiri deke n kɛrɛ a. Yiri ma deke n kɛrɛ toko wo bɛrɛ a.

eng: He is the head of the body, the church, who is the beginning, the one who is firstborn from among the dead so that he might occupy the first place in everything.
local: Yiri ti i jama n kɛrɛ tii a, ye i jama n ti i ŋuniɛ­mbaa ni, yiri ti i jama n bumboori a, yiri ye Nyɛmɛ adu mɔ ateŋge i yiwee nu a, adena i yo deke n kɛrɛ bo Nyɛmɛ ayi bu n mɔ­fɔ.

eng: Because all the fullness of God was pleased to live in him.
local: Dama wɔ sun Nyɛmɛ nu ka, i dɛɛ woo­wa kɛrɛ wo i Wa n nu.

eng: and he reconciled all things to himself through him— whether things on earth or in the heavens. He brought peace through the blood of his cross.
local: Na Baa n dɛɛ ti ma Nyɛmɛ akoro akaaki deke n kɛrɛ bo bu wo aŋgoro ni asiɛŋgu ama bu ni Nyɛmɛ ayo kun, i mbunja n bo i fiteeri i ŋuniɛ nu baka jaanu n su ni, ayo bu ni Nyɛmɛ afiɛn dɔŋgu a.

eng: Once you were alienated from God and you were enemies with him in your minds, which was shown by your evil actions.
local: Ambɛrɛ, saŋga be, am yo woori dede ni Nyɛmɛ wɔ, am yo ti i kpɔ­fɔm wɔ, dama am yo yo satiɛm wɔ, na am sunsunni ti má kpa.

eng: But now he has reconciled you by his physical body through death, to present you before God as a people who are holy, faultless, and without blame.
local: ama, kisa i Wa n woori ka adamande wɔ, na i wuuri baka jaanu n su ni, nyini ma am ni yiri ayo kun a, adena i yó am casi, na má be koro jaraki am, na am lá má ŋgasi be Nyɛmɛ dɔ.

eng: But you need to remain well established and rooted in faith and not shift away from the hope given in the good news that you heard. This message has been preached throughout all creation under heaven. And I, Paul, became a servant of this good news.
local: Ama, i ti ye ni ka am subita yarada n bo am la i kenken saŋga kɛrɛ, na má am yaki i, má am ma deke be kanda am fa kɔ kabo am tiiri labari kpa n bo i maari am yoori i tama n jɔrɛ ni. Nyini labari n ye bu kaanri i jɔrɛ durunya n kɛrɛ nu n a, ye mini Pɔɔlu mmɔɔ ti i amusui­su­fɔ, ye m kan i jɔrɛ n a.

eng: Now Im happy to be suffering for you. Im completing what is missing from Christs sufferings with my own body. Im doing this for the sake of his body, which is the church.
