local: na i susoŋgi miɛ n atin n afiɛn ni. Kunma n bue nnyɔ n kɛrɛ, baka n bo i ma ŋgɔɔ n jinjina ahɛmɛ. Na i susu suu­wa barasu buru ni nnyɔ afɔ kɛrɛ, sara kɛrɛ ni i suu­wa. Na bu sufa i nyawa n tuntun durunya n nu adamande kɛrɛ tɔrɛm.

eng: There will no longer be any curse. The throne of God and the Lamb will be in it, and his servants will worship him.
local: Deke bo Nyɛmɛ ayo i nɔɔ ŋgbɛɛn wó má miɛ n nu. Ama, Nyɛmɛ ni Bɔmbaa n fɛmɛya biɛ ni wó dɔ, na i akɔɔm n súsu i.

eng: They will see his face, and his name will be on their foreheads.
local: Bu ŋú i nyunu­awa dika kabo i ti barasu, na i kɛ́rɛ i duma gɔ bu ŋuma su.

eng: Night will be no more. They wont need the light of a lamp or the light of the sun, for the Lord God will shine on them, and they will rule forever and always.
local: Awosin wó má dɔ, be koro má fitana dɔ, na bu kaaki koro má wiɛ dɔ, dama ya Mi Nyɛmɛ Fɛmɛ ni i tii yó bu wein a. Na bu dí fɛmɛya bo i la má awieeri.

eng: Then he said to me, These words are trustworthy and true. The Lord, the God of the spirits of the prophets, sent his angel to show his servants what must soon take place.
local: Na mɛrɛkɛ n akaaki ase m ka, Ahin nɔaniɛm n ti nahɔrɛ wɔ, na i ti deke bo sɔnɔ yo i yarada. Ya Mi Nyɛmɛ Fɛmɛ bo i faari i Awiɛwiɛ Casi n wuraari i nɔaniɛ kan­fɔm nu ni, yiri asunma i mɛrɛkɛ n ka i ba se i akɔɔm fa kɔ sa bo i yó kisa bɛrɛ n a.

eng: Look! Im coming soon. Favored is the one who keeps the words of the prophecy contained in this scroll.
local: Ya Mibiɛ Yesu ŋa, Am so am sui. I cɛ́ má, m bá kisa. Tere­fiɛ wo sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i deeri nɔaniɛ n bo i wo ahin kadasi n nu na i jɔjɔ fa kɔ sa bo i bá yo n ŋu.

eng: I, John, am the one who heard and saw these things. When I heard and saw them, I fell down to worship at the feet of the angel who had shown them to me.
local: Mini Yohane tiiri, ye m ŋuuri ahin deke n kɛrɛ, m tiiri na m ŋuuri i sɔ ni, na ma kutu mɛrɛkɛ n bo i kereeri nyini dekem n jaa bu ka m su i.

eng: But he said to me, Dont do that! Im a servant just like you and your brothers and sisters, the prophets, and those who keep the words of this scroll. Worship God.
local: Na wɔ se m ka, má m yo sɔ, ama, m kansi Nyɛmɛ ŋgumi. Na wɔ kaaki ase m ka, M ti u beŋgu akɔɔ, ni u ninbaam bo bu ti Nyɛmɛ nɔaniɛ kan­fɔm, ni bo bu de nɔaniɛ n bo i wo ahin kadasi n nu n be wɔ.

eng: Then he said to me, Dont seal up the words of the prophecy contained in this scroll, because the time is near.
local: Na wɔ kaaki ase m ka, má m se ka m fiɛ nɔaniɛ n bo i wo ahin kadasi n nu na i jɔjɔ fa kɔ sa bo i bá yo n su, dama i cɛ́ má, i kɛrɛ yó kisa.

eng: Let those who do wrong keep doing what is wrong. Let the filthy still be filthy. Let those who are righteous keep doing what is right. Let those who are holy still be holy.
local: I ŋa sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i yo satiɛ, ma i kɔ su yo i satiɛ, sɔnɔ kɛrɛ gusu bo i yo i daŋgba sa ni, ma i kɔ su yo i daŋgba sa ni, na sɔnɔ kɛrɛ gusu bo i yo sakpa, ma i kɔ su yo i sakpa ni, na sɔnɔ kɛrɛ gusu bo i ti casi, ma i kɔ su wo i casi wo.

eng: Look! Im coming soon. My reward is with me, to repay all people as their actions deserve.
local: Ya Mibiɛ Yesu ŋa, Am so am sui. I cɛ́ má, m bá kisa, na m bá tɔ sɔnɔ kɛrɛ kaari kabo i juma­yoo­wa ti barasu.

eng: I am the alpha and the omega, the first and the last, the beginning and the end.
local: Mini ti mɔ­fɔ a, na m kaaki ti kasin­fɔ, mini ti deke kɛrɛ bumboori ni i awieeri n a.

eng: Favored are those who wash their robes so that they may have the right of access to the tree of life and may enter the city by the gates.
local: Tere­fiɛ wo minɛm bo ba ŋmisi bu suturam ayo casi n dɔ, adena bu koro nya atin di baka n bo i ma ŋgɔɔ n dɛɛ suu­wa ni, na bu fa miɛ n anɔ n wura miɛ n nu.

eng: Outside are the dogs, the drug users and spell-casters, those who commit sexual immorality, the murderers, the idolaters, and all who love and practice deception.
local: Ama, daŋgba yo­fɔm, ni bo bu di ayiri ŋgbɛɛn­ŋgbɛɛn, ni bara kpini­fɔm, ni somaya kɔ­fɔm, ni minɛ kun­fɔm, ni amɔɛ su­fɔm, ni bo bu bu kɔrɛ bu nɔaniɛ jɔjɔɔ­wa ni bu sa yoori nu n kɛrɛ koro wura má miɛ n nu.

eng: I, Jesus, have sent my angel to bear witness to all of you about these things for the churches. Im the root and descendant of David, the bright morning star.
local: Mini Yesu asunma m mɛrɛkɛ n ka i ba se am ahin jɔrɛ n a, ambɛrɛ bo am wo Kristo jamam n nu ni. Mini ti Fɛmɛ Davidi anuma a, na m ti asaakojo bo i ta ni.

eng: The Spirit and the bride say, Come! Let the one who hears say, Come! And let the one who is thirsty come! Let the one who wishes receive life-giving water as a gift.
local: Awiɛwiɛ Casi n ni konya n ŋa, Bra. Sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i ti ahin, ma i mi gusu se ka, Bra. Na sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo nzuehɔɛ ati i, na i koro ŋgɔɔ nzue ni, i bra na i ba de nu ŋgbɛɛn.

eng: Now I bear witness to everyone who hears the words of the prophecy contained in this scroll: If anyone adds to them, God will add to that person the plagues that are written in this scroll.
local: Mini Yohane subɔbɔ sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i ti ahin kadasi n nu jɔrɛ fa kɔ sa n bo i bá yo n lɛɛ, ka sɔnɔ kɛrɛ bo i faari nɔaniɛ be bukaari su, Nyɛmɛ fá kekereke n kɛrɛ bo i wo ahin kadasi n nu n buka i mi su.

eng: If anyone takes away from the words of this scroll of prophecy, God will take away that persons share in the tree of life and the holy city, which are described in this scroll.
local: Na sɔnɔ kɛrɛ gusu bo i yiiri nɔaniɛ n bo i wo ahin kadasi n nu n be, Nyɛmɛ yí i mi n aceeri na i nya má baka n bo i ma ŋgɔɔ n dɛɛ suu­wa n be, na i má i wura má miɛ casi n nu, kabo ba kɛrɛ bu jɔrɛ ahin kadasi n nu.

eng: The one who bears witness to these things says, Yes, Im coming soon. Amen. Come, Lord Jesus!.
local: Yiri n bo i di ahin jɔrɛm kɛrɛ daani n ase ka, Nahɔrɛ. I cɛ́ má, m bá kisa. Ma i yo sɔ. Ya Mibiɛ Yesu, bra. Ami.

eng: The grace of the Lord Jesus be with all.
local: Ma ya Mibiɛ Yesu buka Nyɛmɛ minɛm kɛrɛ. Ami.
